name: Khách sạn Hoianese Quiet Old Town (Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel)
address: 30 Bà Triệu, Phường Cẩm Phổ, Cẩm Phô, Hội An, Việt Nam
description:
Khám Phá Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel - Trải Nghiệm Đẳng Cấp Tại Hội An

Nằm ngay trung tâm của phố cổ Hội An xinh đẹp, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đích thực với phong cách thiết kế tinh tế và dịch vụ chu đáo. Khách sạn có tổng cộng 20 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, phù hợp cho các cặp đôi, gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp cổ kính của phố cổ. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 14:00 và trả phòng đến 11:00 sáng hôm sau, giúp quý khách dễ dàng lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi của mình.

Điểm đặc biệt của khách sạn là chính sách thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 10 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ. Với vị trí đắc địa và dịch vụ tận tâm, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel chính là điểm đến lý tưởng để trải nghiệm nét đẹp truyền thống pha lẫn hiện đại của Hội An.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, khách lưu trú sẽ được trải nghiệm những tiện ích hiện đại và tiện nghi nhằm mang lại sự thoải mái tối đa trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là tiện lợi, giúp bạn giữ gìn quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và tươi mới sau những ngày khám phá thành phố cổ Hội An. Đặc biệt, các hộp an toàn cá nhân được trang bị đầy đủ trong phòng giúp khách yên tâm về tài sản quý giá của mình trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Ngoài ra, khách còn được tận hưởng kết nối Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn dễ dàng liên lạc và chia sẻ những khoảnh khắc đẹp của chuyến đi. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, mang lại cảm giác thư thái và dễ chịu. Tất cả những tiện ích này đều hướng tới việc tạo ra một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái, an toàn và thuận tiện cho khách lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, du khách sẽ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái với các tiện nghi hiện đại. Phòng nghỉ được trang bị điều hòa không khí giúp duy trì nhiệt độ lý tưởng, mang lại cảm giác dễ chịu bất kể thời tiết bên ngoài. Đặc biệt, mỗi phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn, ngắm nhìn cảnh quan xung quanh và tận hưởng không khí trong lành của phố cổ Hội An.
Ngoài ra, khách lưu trú còn được cung cấp đầy đủ các dụng cụ vệ sinh cá nhân như đồ dùng vệ sinh, dầu gội, sữa tắm, giúp bạn cảm thấy tiện lợi và sạch sẽ trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Máy sấy tóc cũng được trang bị sẵn sàng để phục vụ nhu cầu của khách, đảm bảo bạn luôn chuẩn bị sẵn sàng để ra ngoài khám phá thành phố xinh đẹp này một cách tự tin và thoải mái.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo từ mọi chi tiết nhỏ nhất. Không chỉ mang lại sự sạch sẽ, dịch vụ này còn giúp bạn cảm thấy yên tâm và thoải mái hơn trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Hãy để chúng tôi chăm sóc không gian của bạn, để bạn có thể tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp cổ kính của phố cổ Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về việc dọn dẹp hay bảo trì.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đặc Trưng Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình, từ các phòng Budget Double phù hợp cho những chuyến đi tiết kiệm, đến các phòng Standard Double và Superior Double mang lại sự thoải mái hơn trong không gian nghỉ dưỡng. Đối với những khách muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng và đẳng cấp, các phòng Deluxe King, Deluxe Lake View và Deluxe Balcony Room sẽ mang đến cảm giác thư thái và tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp của Hội An. Ngoài ra, phòng Deluxe Balcony Room còn giúp bạn tận hưởng không khí trong lành và cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp ngay từ ban công riêng của mình.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quá trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Điều này giúp bạn yên tâm hơn khi chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi, để tập trung tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc đẹp tại Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về thủ tục hay chi phí phát sinh.

Khám Phá Vẻ Đẹp Truyền Thống của Cẩm Phô - Hội An

Cẩm Phô là trái tim của phố cổ Hội An, nơi lưu giữ những nét đẹp cổ kính và truyền thống đặc trưng của miền Trung Việt Nam. Dạo bước qua những con phố nhỏ rợp bóng cây, du khách sẽ cảm nhận được không khí yên bình và đậm đà lịch sử qua các ngôi nhà cổ kính, cửa sổ mái ngói âm dương và những hàng quán bán đặc sản địa phương. Khu vực này không chỉ là trung tâm của các hoạt động văn hóa, mà còn là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức ẩm thực phong phú, từ cao lầu, bánh mì Phượng đến các món ăn truyền thống khác, mang đậm hương vị đặc trưng của Hội An.

Ngoài ra, Cẩm Phô còn gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Chùa Cầu, Phố cổ Hội An và các làng nghề truyền thống. Buổi tối, khu vực này trở nên lung linh huyền ảo dưới ánh đèn lồng rực rỡ, tạo nên một không gian lãng mạn và đầy cảm xúc cho du khách. Với vẻ đẹp vừa cổ kính vừa hiện đại, Cẩm Phô là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá, trải nghiệm và lưu giữ những ký ức đẹp về Hội An - thành phố cổ kính và quyến rũ của Việt Nam.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đến Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Từ sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel bằng nhiều phương tiện khác nhau. Khoảng cách từ sân bay đến khách sạn khoảng 30 km, mất khoảng 45 phút đi xe. Bạn có thể lựa chọn dịch vụ taxi riêng, dịch vụ đưa đón của khách sạn hoặc thuê xe máy để tự lái. Nếu muốn tiết kiệm hơn, các chuyến xe buýt địa phương cũng sẵn sàng phục vụ, đưa bạn đến trung tâm Hội An, từ đó chỉ cần đi bộ hoặc gọi xe ôm để đến khách sạn nằm tại khu phố cổ Cẩm Phô xinh đẹp.

Vị Trí Đắc Địa Gần Các Di Tích Lịch Sử và Văn Hóa Nổi Tiếng

Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel nằm ngay trung tâm phố cổ Hội An, nơi hội tụ của những di tích lịch sử và kiến trúc cổ kính đặc sắc. Chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ ngắn là Chùa Cầu, biểu tượng nổi tiếng của thành phố, mang đậm nét văn hóa truyền thống của người Hội An. Bên cạnh đó, du khách còn dễ dàng ghé thăm Nhà cổ Quân Thắng và Nhà cổ Phùng Hưng để khám phá kiến trúc cổ độc đáo cùng những câu chuyện lịch sử phong phú của khu phố cổ.
Ngoài ra, các địa danh như Đền Quan Công, Đền Cam Phổ và Hội quán Quảng Đông cũng nằm gần đó, mang đến trải nghiệm văn hóa đa dạng và sâu sắc. Những điểm đến này không chỉ giúp du khách hiểu rõ hơn về lịch sử và tín ngưỡng của người dân địa phương mà còn tạo nên một hành trình khám phá đầy màu sắc và ý nghĩa trong chuyến lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Những Nhà Hàng Gần Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Khu vực xung quanh Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel là một thiên đường ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc trưng của ẩm thực Ấn Độ tại Babas Kitchen hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn sáng, brunch và lunch lành mạnh tại Ellie's Cafe Hoi An. Những tín đồ bánh mì sẽ không thể bỏ qua Banh Mi Sum, trong khi những ai yêu thích ẩm thực Ấn Độ có thể ghé SRI Spices Indian Family Restaurant để trải nghiệm hương vị đậm đà. Các nhà hàng như Cabanon, Seashell by Nu Eatery, Mai Fish Restaurant và Quan Chay Nhat Da mang đến những lựa chọn đa dạng từ hải sản tươi ngon, món chay đến các món đặc trưng của địa phương. Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể tham gia lớp học nấu ăn chay hoặc thưởng thức cà phê tại Relics Coffee and Restaurant, hoặc khám phá các món bánh truyền thống Việt Nam tại CHAY Corner trong Hội An.

Các điểm mua sắm nổi bật xung quanh Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Khách lưu trú tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel sẽ dễ dàng tiếp cận nhiều điểm mua sắm độc đáo và hấp dẫn trong khu vực. Bạn có thể thăm Phòng Trưng Bày Nghệ Thuật để thưởng thức các tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo, hoặc ghé qua Nhà may 724 Tailors và Nhà may BYFAS để đặt may trang phục theo phong cách riêng. Các cửa hàng như Cửa hàng Bạch Dương, Tiệm vải Bi Hạnh, Tiệm vải Nu Ni và Nhà may Khôi mang đến sự đa dạng về vải vóc và thời trang. Đối với những ai yêu thích phụ kiện và đồ da, Hiệu da Min Thu là điểm đến lý tưởng. Ngoài ra, Chị Ba Boutique và 79 Tony cũng là những địa chỉ mua sắm thời trang phong cách, giúp du khách dễ dàng tìm thấy những món đồ phù hợp để lưu giữ kỷ niệm về chuyến đi của mình.

Giá phòng tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel - Cạnh tranh và hợp lý

Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel mang đến mức giá phòng trung bình từ 26 đến 50 USD, phù hợp với ngân sách của nhiều du khách khi khám phá phố cổ Hội An. Với mức giá này, du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian ấm cúng, tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chất lượng mà không cần lo lắng về chi phí. Đặc biệt, mức giá này khá cạnh tranh so với mức trung bình của toàn thành phố Hội An, cũng dao động từ 26 đến 50 USD, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng lựa chọn và trải nghiệm mà không phải hy sinh về chất lượng dịch vụ.

So với các khách sạn khác trong khu vực, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel nổi bật với giá cả hợp lý, phù hợp với nhiều nhóm du khách từ du lịch gia đình, cặp đôi đến nhóm bạn. Điều này làm cho khách sạn trở thành một điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp của phố cổ Hội An mà vẫn tiết kiệm chi phí. Với mức giá cạnh tranh cùng dịch vụ tốt, đây chính là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho những ai muốn tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp của Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về giá cả.

Đánh Giá Tích Cực Về Khách Sạn Hoianese Old Town Boutique

Điểm đặc biệt khiến khách hàng yêu thích nơi đây chính là vị trí thuận tiện, nằm ngay trung tâm, giúp dễ dàng khám phá và trải nghiệm các điểm đến nổi bật của Hội An. Đồng thời, đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp và luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ đã góp phần nâng cao trải nghiệm của khách lưu trú, đạt điểm số 9.9 cho hiệu suất làm việc của nhân viên. Tất cả những yếu tố này đã tạo nên một không gian nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng, nơi khách hàng không chỉ cảm thấy hài lòng mà còn muốn quay trở lại trong những lần tới.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã được trải nghiệm sự thuận tiện của việc tiếp cận đi bộ, và các tiện nghi trong phòng cùng tình trạng phòng tắm rất đáng hài lòng. Nhờ vào thái độ thân thiện của nhân viên (spring, kimmi) và tình trạng vệ sinh sạch sẽ, tôi đã có thời gian thoải mái. Wifi cũng kết nối ổn định và tiện lợi. Trong khách sạn còn có hệ thống cho thuê xe máy và bữa sáng cũng tuyệt vời, rất yên tĩnh. Tổng thể, mức độ hài lòng so với giá cả rất cao, đây là một nơi lưu trú mà ai cũng có thể giới thiệu!!
sample_comments.title: Vị trí hoàn hảo và chỗ ở sạch sẽ.
Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Ấn tượng ban đầu là trong quá trình đặt phòng team lễ tân hỗ trợ mình rất nhiệt tình, các bạn trẻ rất chu đáo bạn Ngân, bạn Xuân thì hỗ trợ thủ tục, giới thiệu Hội An, bạn Thịnh, bạn Nguyên hỗ trợ nhận phòng và giải quyết các vấn đề phát sinh trong quá trình lưu trú, Tuyền thì giới thiệu các quán ruột địa phương :)) . Khi nhận phòng thì thấy phòng xinh và ấm lòng khi thấy postcard dành cho mình. Khách sạn sạch sẽ, thơm tho đầy đủ tiện nghi, có vị trí thuận lợi để đi khám phá, foodtour quanh Hội An. Không có điểm nào chê được luôn.

sample_comments.text: Nơi này sẽ là một lựa chọn tốt. Đánh giá rất cao nên tôi khá tò mò, khi đến nơi tôi đã hiểu lý do. Nhân viên thân thiện như Helen, Kimmi, Spring, Emma luôn chào đón với nụ cười tươi và bữa sáng hàng ngày cũng rất tuyệt. Bộ đồ giường thoải mái và sạch sẽ khiến tôi có cảm giác dễ chịu khi ở lại, và không xa Phố Cổ nên tôi có thể ở lại yên tĩnh và tận hưởng Phố Cổ.
sample_comments.title: Nếu bạn đang lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi Hội An
Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives:
Nhân viên rất nhiệt tình , vui vẻ , phục vụ tận tâm , cho quà dễ thương. Ca sáng và ca chiều 4 bạn nv tên : Ngân , Tuyền , Xuân , Nguyên . 
Xe máy bị hư nón bạn nv rất nhiệt tình cho mượn nón để chạy luôn ạ

sample_comments.text: Đây là một khách sạn boutique mới mở, có phong cách cổ điển rất hợp gu, phòng rất thoải mái với tầm nhìn tuyệt vời, khi nhận phòng có bánh đậu xanh miễn phí và nước uống không giới hạn. Ngoài ra, tôi cũng muốn đặc biệt khen ngợi một số chị em tiếp tân: ***, ***, *** và ***, mỗi ngày vào ra khách sạn đều nhiệt tình chào hỏi. Họ còn giới thiệu cho chúng tôi những địa điểm ăn uống và vui chơi địa phương rất tuyệt, khách sạn rất sạch sẽ, rất thoải mái.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên cực kì thân thiện, nếu có đi Hoian thì recommend chỗ này nha

sample_comments.text: スタッフ của bạn đã có sự phục vụ rất tận tâm và chu đáo. Bao gồm cả việc trao đổi qua email trước và sau khi đến nơi, tôi đã nhận được sự tiếp đón tuyệt vời nhất. Phố cổ cũng ở trong khoảng cách đi bộ, vì vậy thật tuyệt vời. Cảm ơn bạn, spring.
sample_comments.title: Dịch vụ khách hàng tuyệt vời.
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Mọi thứ đều tuyệt vời từ nhân viên đến không gian, gì mình cũng thítttt
sample_comments.negatives: Chẳng có gì chê, có á, mấy bạn nhân viên lúc nào cũng niềm nở, chào hỏi bất cứ chỗ nào gặp, làm tụi mình ngại quá chời, đến nổi vừa đặt chân lên phòng, mình phải quay xún gửi tuýp cho mí bạn luôn

sample_comments.text:
Trong chuyến đi Việt Nam lần thứ ba, tôi đã lần đầu tiên ghé thăm Hội An.
Khách sạn Hoianese Quiet Old Town nằm hơi xa khu phố cổ, điểm tham quan chính của Hội An, và tọa lạc trên một con phố yên tĩnh, tách biệt khỏi sự ồn ào. (Thật lý tưởng để đi dạo bộ khám phá khu phố cổ)

Khi làm thủ tục nhận phòng, nhân viên Helen đã tận tình giải thích về Hội An và trong lúc đó đã pha cho tôi một ly cà phê Việt Nam. Mặc dù tôi không quen nói tiếng Anh nhưng cô ấy đã kiên nhẫn hỗ trợ.

Họ thật sự đã hướng dẫn rất tận tình về nhiều thông tin và các tour du lịch. Điều này không phải chỉ để bán tour mà là thể hiện sự hiếu khách mong muốn tôi tận hưởng trọn vẹn Hội An.

Trong phần hướng dẫn của Helen có một buổi workshop về cà phê, nơi tôi có cơ hội tự tay pha chế những món cà phê nổi tiếng của Việt Nam như cà phê trứng, cà phê muối và cà phê dừa.
Chi tiết hơn có thể tra cứu tại Tropical Cafe & Bistro.

Tôi đã đến quán cà phê này bằng xe đạp thuê từ khách sạn. Điều này cũng rất rẻ chỉ 50k một ngày.

Về phần khách sạn, phòng ốc thật xinh đẹp và sạch sẽ với giường king size, nơi tôi có thể thư giãn thoải mái. Nếu có điều gì đó tôi muốn đề cập thì chỉ có việc đèn và quạt trong phòng tắm cùng một công tắc nên không thể chỉ bật quạt và tắt đèn được. Đó là điều duy nhất không hoàn hảo ở một khách sạn tuyệt vời như vậy.

Tôi muốn tự khen mình vì đã tìm được một khách sạn như thế này.
Cảm ơn Helen và tất cả các nhân viên khác.
sample_comments.title: Tôi muốn tự khen mình vì đã tìm được một khách sạn như vậy.
Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Không gian đẹp và thoáng mát, đầy đủ tiện nghi. Cổ điển và sang trọng

sample_comments.title: Hospitality is the best.
sample_comments.text: When I mentioned at check-in that I would be participating in a tour that departs before breakfast time, Ms. Spring cheerfully responded that they could accommodate me earlier. The following morning at breakfast, Ms. Kimmi kindly packed up the leftover food for me. Thank you very much for your great service. I was able to enjoy the tour experience.

sample_comments.title: The budget room needs an improvment
sample_comments.positives:
- Room is clean and big with a window, seems to be newly designed. Bed is comfortable and new towels were replaced everyday which was nice. The bathroom was comfortable and had hot water for a very long time. 
- Helen and Sunny were very kind and helped us a lot with transport and more. Coffee and tea is available for free.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Lots of mites everywhere in the room (they don't sting), worms in the bathroom, also we had a little gecko friend. On our first day we asked the staff to handle the problem but nothing really changed. 
- Room had a weird smell that came from the bathroom.
- Light came through the lobby so the room wasn't fully dark at night.
- We had a flood in our bathroom because a pipe broke down in the middle of the night. It was inconvenient but a staff came really quick and fixed the pipe.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Nice and pleasant place. Well kept and really clean with good welcome snacks. The staff were really friendly and hospitable including making a point to remember our names. Bao's guide around old town was well appreciated. Will certainly be back when there is a chance

sample_comments.title: Minor Teething problems easily fixed but staff are fantastic!
sample_comments.positives:
The staff were 100% the best and most helpful staff I've encountered in SE Asia...
Helen,Sunny and Gavy were all super attentive,informative and could not do enough to help..
sample_comments.negatives: No TV in room and unfortunately it rains 24/7 from October-February which was miserable as we had to spend long periods in our room with no entertainmentI know I should of done due diligence on the weather!

sample_comments.title: Jjang jjang Hoanis is great!
sample_comments.text: I visited not long after it was built, and the bedding is clean and the hot water works well. I had a very comfortable stay. The location and price were very good, except for the fact that there was a hotel or house in front, which meant I couldn't open the curtains. I regret only staying for one night.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
I liked the staff who are very friendly, funny, and amazing. 

Emma, Ivy, and Helen were extraordinary and they made our stay a great one.

sample_comments.title: Genuinely nice place with super helpful staff
sample_comments.text: The staff here are very nice and always willing to go above and beyond to help you with anything you need. That was really the stand out aspect of this place. The free coffee and drinks were nice too. The room itself was a little small, the location is an bit of a walk from where you probably want to be (but at least it's quiet and dark at night), and the bathroom shower situation was pretty ridiculous (there's no way to take a shower without getting water everywhere). But I did appreciate that the staff are super friendly and helpful and do their best to go above and beyond. It took what would've been a fine hotel experience and made it great.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Good room nice location would stay again

sample_comments.title: Nice and quiet stay near the Old Town.
sample_comments.text:
Good value for money boutique hotel, (20 rooms), nicely renovated. 
Good location: not too far from the Old Town and the River (15-30 min walk, depending on your pace).
The neighbourhood is authentic and you can find good places to enjoy the local food specialities.
The staff at the Reception is doing an excellent job to inform you in detail about the many places to visit and can make arrangements for booking cars/vans at reasonable prices.
The room I had was fine with a nice bathtub. The breakfast was good (with VN coffee) and served to the table in a quiet atmosphere (a good change from the crowded buffets of bigger hotels).
I also appreciated the (optional) cultural part including a walking tour and a history talk from a specialist.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Staff were very friendly and helpful - Kimmi and Spring were very accommodating! Location was great and the complimentary walking tour was much appreciated.
sample_comments.negatives: The shower set up was slightly difficult to use.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful experience with 2 nights
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is located on a quiet street, yet still within a convenient walking distance of about 15 minutes to the main areas- Hoi an night market and ancient town . I had booked two rooms, and we were pleasantly surprised to receive a complimentary upgrade to larger rooms with both street and lake views.
The rooms were clean, modern, and well-maintained. The water pressure in the shower was excellent, and the beds were very comfortable---we had a great night's sleep.
Our first impression was very positive, thanks to Kimmy, who warmly welcomed us on arrival. The reception team---Spring, Kimmy, Helen, and Emma---were always friendly and greeted us with genuine smiles.
They were approachable and extremely helpful throughout our stay. A special thanks to Spring, who came to the rescue on my first night when I realized we were missing bath towels, and also assisted us in arranging the coconut basket ride.
The breakfast was delicious and has variety of food , though there is no buffet available, but you can ask for second helping
Overall, we had a wonderful experience, and I would definitely choose to stay here again without any hesitation. Highly recommended!

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel close to the old town
sample_comments.positives:
Staff was extremely helpful. We tried all their recommendations for food and tailors, all excellent. 
It is super close to the old town. We walked all the time. The breakfast was really good. I would come back. We checked in late, and they left everything ready for us.
sample_comments.negatives: All good in general. A bit of noise from the ventilation on the 4th floor. It is manageable, but If you're sensitive, bring your earplugs. They offer earplugs too.

sample_comments.title: Best hotels to stay in Da Nang and Hoi An.
sample_comments.text: In mid-March, I stayed at the best hotel during my trip to Da Nang and Hoi An. I used three hotels during my trip, including a 5-star hotel, but this hotel was the most comfortable. The hospitality and smiles of the hotel staff were the best, without a doubt. The location is also close to the old town, in a quiet area with stylish cafes, and I highly recommend it. If I get a chance to come back here, I will definitely want to stay again.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant, clean and charming hotel with the best possible staff.
sample_comments.positives: The staff is excellent, delightful Gavy and Ivy helped so much and were very kind. Location was definitely quieter away from the nightlife, but construction present all around so some daytime noise at this time. Not a problem for us, it was stopped at dark.
sample_comments.negatives: The ventilation in the wet room/ bathroom wasn't adequate and kept things damp and warm. Small issue and air conditioner helped. Seated shower took some getting used to, but is actually clever.

sample_comments.title: Value for money budget hotel
sample_comments.text: Hotel is located in a small quiet lane. We were upgraded to a slightly bigger room on the third floor. Only thing lacking in the room is a TV. Although there is no safe in the room, there is a lockable drawer at the desk. No bottled water but filtered water provided.

sample_comments.title: rough start, but in the end, a very comfortable almost 2 week stay at Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel
sample_comments.positives:
A lot of things to like about this hotel, with #1 being the staff, especially Ivy, Min, Tin, Helen. On the first night, i had a hard time because the strong smell of bugspray in the room/on the bed made it really hard for me to breathe. Without me saying anything the next morning, Ivy went out of her way to do everything she could to make me comfortable. Really, really proactive on her part. Min and Helen gave me fantastic local recommendations that really were excellent recommendations that you couldn't google for. And, Tin, did a great job with new visitor orientation on my first night.

Probably #2 thing i liked was they they upgraded me for free to a really lovely room with a lot of big windows, which really helped with ventilating the room (i was there in january, the temperatures were lovely most of the time, in the 70s, Farenheit).

#3, absolutely fantastic location, just what i was looking for - close enough to talk to old town but far enough outside that i was able to enjoy a lot of local eating places (not touristy ones). I mean, so, so many great family-owned restaurants and eating places nearby. All the best ATMs are just around the corner. Hotel is on small/quiet (relatively speaking street)

#4, the room itself was really nice.
The balcony was really, really nice - It was sheltered from the rain, did not receive direct sunlight (there was plenty of natural light that filled the room when i opened the curtains). It was a good size balcony, too, *not* so narrow that you could only stand. It would've been really, really nice if there was a small chair and table on the balcony to enjoy the balcony more. It was still really lovely, though.

#5 Unlimited, free drinking water, as much as you needed, instead of just the usual 2 bottles only complimentary water per day. The free and accessible drinking water on each floor was fantastic.

#6 The fridge kept drinks COLD.

#7 Hotel offered reasonable rates for laundry (50k vnd per kg)
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Too much strong bugspray smell on my bed, coming from either the mattress or the frame (changing out all sheets and pillows didn't rid of the bugspray smell, so must've been mattress or bedframe). It gave me headaches and made it hard for me to breathe. But, the good side is that there were no mosquitoes/only few mosquitoes.
2. Hand-held shower instead of hands-free shower in the bathroom. But, the good side is that water pressure was decent and i always had nice *hot* water when i needed it
3. The sink was weird because the sink spicket had barely any clearance over the sink, so there wasn't enough room for me to put both my hands under the running sink water (i had to cup the water in one hand to pour over the other hand)
4. hotel charges 3% fee if you pay for the room using credit card, and this either conveyed to me when i booked, or was not conveyed in a way that i was able to easily see this info. Either way, it came as a surprise to me. But, the hotel staff were incredibly understanding and gave me an extra couple days to get my debit card working to pull cash from an ATM to pay by VND (the hotel only take VND if you pay by cash, and they do not do any money exchange, like some other Hoi An hotels i have stayed at). I just had to pay the first few nights, and then i paid the remaining nights after 2 days when i finally got my atm card working
5. no pool, but this is something that was made clear in hotel description, so i was not surprised about it
6. The room size was smaller than what i'm accustomed to when staying in other (more expensive) hotels in Hoi An; but the room was not so small that i felt cramped.. i think because the space is well utilized
Overall, the pros far outweighed the cons, and i would consider staying at this hotel again if i didn't need a swimming pool and the bugspray use was toned down.

sample_comments.title: Nice and quiet hotel
sample_comments.text: Receptionists speak very good English and very helpful. Room is a tad small. Clean toilet, bedsheets, pillows and towels. The breakfast was really good but they should clarify that each client has to get his/her own breakfast. The first morning, they told me that for 75000vnd I can get a main dish, special local dish, yogurt, drink and free coffee. I couldn't finish the meal myself so I shared with my wife. We were surprised that it was so cheap. The next day I ordered the same breakfast again, to be told that I cannot share my meal. That was the oddest thing I've ever heard in my life that you cannot so what you want with your food that you pay for. After some clarification, it turned out that for 75k I can eat as much as I want like I was in a buffet, and only me. This awkward situation would have been prevented if the right information was conveyed on first morning there. Other than that little embarrassing event, everything else was perfect.

sample_comments.title: A very good choice in Hoi An. Highly recommended
sample_comments.positives: Clean, pleasant, good location and very warm staff

sample_comments.title: Charming hotel with great location
sample_comments.text: Very good location near old town. They offer a little pushy various excursions during your check in for a very long time.

sample_comments.title: One of the stay that we will remember for a long time
sample_comments.positives: The people, everyone there ia very friendly, humble and helpful. They welcome us with a very warm hospitality
sample_comments.negatives: A resto area can be improved

sample_comments.title: Very cute, good location
sample_comments.text: Very cute room, close enough to the old area to walk but far enough to be quieter which is nice at night. Extremely lovely staff who are very knowledgeable and helpful. Breakfast is delicious. The shower is a bit strange but it had hit water and decent pressure.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: I like that they have free walking tour about Hoian's history.

sample_comments.title: Perfect location and extremely welcoming staff.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located just outside the old town, which is perfect! A bit of peace and quiet is really nice.
All the staff are very welcoming and helpful. Thank you again, Helen, for your kindness and assistance. We highly recommend it!

sample_comments.title: Friendly staff
sample_comments.positives:
The team, Helen, Min and Judy went above and beyond to ensure a smooth check in process. Also, they took the time to share places and things to do during my time here and also ensured I had an early check. I also forgot something at the hotel and there was no hesitation in assisting me retrieve my item. Thank you again for your kind, friendly and helpful support. I was upgraded and the room was clean. I didn't get the rest that was needed. 
I do appreciate the team though.

sample_comments.title: Good cleanliness, great value for money
sample_comments.text: Clean rooms and surroundings. Quality of bedding is beyond expectations considering the price point. Service was great with notable mention of Gavy and Tin. Facilities basic but as expected considering the area and size of built-up.

sample_comments.title: Very nice !
sample_comments.positives: Everything. Mostly employees. Free coffee did not hurt!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: I've stayed here several times and everytime I come here they still maintain to their room qualities and the service. The room is clean, well decorated, and the staff Min and Helen are super friendly welcome me and assist me, even I sometimes have a late check in over 21.00 pm.. will like to stay again at this hotel for next time.. please keep it up for the room and services

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: I loved how friendly the staff are. The room itself is also really spacious and comfortable. The AC worked really well. They also offer Vietnamese coffee on site through the day which was really nice.
sample_comments.negatives: I didn't like how low the ceiling is over the bathtub. Breakfast options could also expand a bit.

sample_comments.title: Paying it forward - unsolicited review
sample_comments.text:
I'm writing this review to pay it forward---like the helpful reviews that guided me here.

The staff---Gavy, Spring, Ivy, Helen, and Emma---are the true heart of this place. Young and sincere, they speak English beautifully and respond instantly on WhatsApp. They treated me like a dear friend.

A highlight: Helen surprised me with a birthday cake and celebrated with me. When I'd just met Ivy after the history session, she rearranged her plans and rode me to Danang on her scooter to help with an urgent errand.

I'd recognized these staff names from reviews before arriving---that's why travelers rave about them. Genuine care at an unbeatable price.

I will definitely choose this hotel again. Highly recommended! Already planning my next visit for September and next year.

(Just a small note, there is no pool, you can head to the beach for a swim as alternative).

sample_comments.title: Very nice place in hoi an
sample_comments.positives: Very nice rooms and very very nice staff, helped us with everything. They has shampoo shower gel and conditioner at the bathroom and free water.
sample_comments.negatives: When we moved to the second floor there was a bit of noise from the lobby. And there was also no window outside.

sample_comments.title: Experience
sample_comments.text: We stayed 2 nights on early Jan. Min who gave all the details about Hoi An on our arrival. She always greeted with a smile and I appreciate her initiative to have conversation with kindness. As it was our first time in Hoi An she helped us with the recommendation, she made a lot easy for us to know about the place and culture. We realised it was the best experience we had in Vietnam. The location of Hotel was perfect not too far from the central location and not too crowded. It was peaceful. Would definitely choose to stay again if we go to Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: A wonderful place to stay. The best value you can find :)
sample_comments.positives: Clean, comfortable, professional service. Feels like home. I had an issue at night and needed support -> The night service responded promptly and took instant action :)

sample_comments.title: Great hotel but rooms are noisy
sample_comments.text:
Great location, clean rooms and super friendly staff. 

If you want a quiet room you shouldn't go there. I stayed on the first floor and you could hear every word of the reception and breakfast. You hear the talks of the other rooms, even someone is taking a shower

sample_comments.title: Excellent service and nice hotel
sample_comments.positives: The staff was amazing. When I checked in they only had a room on the lower level by the door. I expressed I didn't feel comfortable and the next day they upgraded my room with a balcony. They were so sweet and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: The tours are a bit pricey

sample_comments.title: Fantastic Stay with Exceptional Service!
sample_comments.text:
My recent stay at Hoianese Old Town was truly fantastic! This hotel offers great value for money with its incredibly clean and well-maintained rooms. 
What truly set this hotel apart, however, was the outstanding staff. Every single person I encountered was attentive and genuinely cared for guests. A special shout-out goes to Halen at the front desk, who was an absolute star! Halen went above and beyond, providing invaluable recommendations for tours and incredibly useful local information. It was such a relief to find that all the staff spoke excellent English, making communication effortless and enjoyable.
I highly recommend Hoianese Old Town for anyone looking for a comfortable stay with top-notch service. I'll definitely be back!

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel, amazing staff!
sample_comments.positives: Had a lovely stay here. The staff - Spring, Kimmi, Helen and Emma are an absolute delight - super helpful and can't do enough for you. The hotel itself was well kept, quiet, and located a short walk from the old town.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Julie was the nicest and kindest, and helped us with everything we asked for.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic! Would definitely come again. The staff really made this place shine. So positive, friendly and helpful!
sample_comments.positives: Fantastic property - very cute, comfortable and close to the action in Hoi An.
sample_comments.negatives: Shower in the bathroom was a bit awkward, but I think that's because it is a Heritage property with usual spacing in the rooms.

sample_comments.title: New and so close to the old town but also nice and quiet
sample_comments.text:
We really enjoyed our stay here, The staff are super friendly and very efficient. The room was nice and a good Bathroom, Although I don't enjoy showers over baths and this was a corner bath with a handheld shower. 

The breakfast was good and there was lots of it. The only thing missing was a swimming pool and it would've been perfect! 

We really enjoyed walking into the old town which was pretty hectic and crazy so it was nice to come back to the calm of this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
What a wonderful experience at this hotel. The rooms are great, clean, and spacious and the location is perfect as it's a 7 min walk to the old town and quiet, but the true highlight is the staff here. Helen, Spring, Emma and Kimmi were so friendly and helpful during my stay. Helen spent almost 30 minutes with me going over a map of Hoi An and sharing recommendations and tips. Every time I entered and exited the hotel, the ladies were always there to enthusiastically greet me and send me off, remembering my name and what I scheduled for that day. 

The tours through them were also amazing and I loved my tour guide Cindy, who guided me on both the cycling tour and walking tour. 

Thank you ladies for making this a wonderful experience. I'll always remember your waves and smiles

sample_comments.title: Wonderful two nights stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Out of the three hotels we booked during our Vietnam trip, this was hands-down our favorite! The staff---especially Spring, Kimmi, Helen, and the rest of the team---went above and beyond to make us feel at home. It was incredible how they remembered every guest's name and greeted us warmly every time we walked by. We were even treated to a room upgrade, which was spacious, spotless, and incredibly comfortable. Combined with the fantastic location, our stay here was an absolute delight. We will absolutely be returning on our next trip!

sample_comments.title: Best staff we've experienced across Southeast Asia. Very clean, great location.
sample_comments.positives: Absolute best hospitality I've received at a hotel, and I travel for work. Also very clean and great location.

sample_comments.title: If you are planning a trip to Hoi An,
sample_comments.text: This place will be a good choice. I was curious because of the high rating, and upon arrival, I understood why. The friendly staff, including Helen, Kimmy, Spring, and Emma, always greeted us with bright smiles, and the breakfast was excellent every day. The bedding was comfortable and clean, making my stay enjoyable. It was also not far from the Old Town, allowing me to enjoy it while staying quietly.

sample_comments.title: Quaint, quiet & managed efficiently by a team of very hospitable people!
sample_comments.positives: Quaint & quiet & perfectly managed by a delightfully friendly team!

sample_comments.title: Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Very nice stay just for 1 night. We liked the location because the area was quiet at night but short walk from the old town. All the staff were very helpful and friendly. Spring walked us through checkin and recommended many different activities for us to do while in Hoi An. Overall a great stay and good value for money

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The hotel was quiet but in a good location close to the old town. The room was very comfortable and not caramped. Breakfast was excellent and the staff outstanding at taking care of the customers. I worked mostly with Spring who contacted me a couple of days before my booking, but all the staff were most gracious.

sample_comments.title: Service, decoration and breakfast.
sample_comments.text:
The boutique hotel have a very nice decoration and the bed is huge:
The staff is amazing; mainly a lady called Spring.
They make the breakfast to order, there is not so much variety but what they are doing is fresh and delicious.
I would come back.

sample_comments.title: Great Place - Amazing staff
sample_comments.positives:
Hotel was very charming, clean, and overall pleasant. Staff made the stay even more enjoyable, they were so friendly. Especially Helen, Spring, Gavy & Kimmi. 

The pillows in the room were some of the best I've had on the trip, so comfortable, easy to fall asleep.
sample_comments.negatives: Not much I didn't like, only thing that I didn't really enjoy was the step into the big bathtub to shower.

sample_comments.title: 5 stars
sample_comments.text: It has 5 stars on Google review! Happy with the service from Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel. Walking distance to eateries and about 10-12 minutes to the Ancient Town (leisurely walk). Must give thumbs up to the staff, from those I have not met (Helen, who kept in touch via messages) to Ivy, Emma and 1 more girl (I forgot her name) who were enthusiastic in attending to us. Comfy bed, hearty breakfast, didnt regret our choice at all.

sample_comments.title: Cultural experience
sample_comments.positives: Very central and close to the market, bicycle tour, and the hoi an lanterns

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel and nice day in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: We had a pleasant stay at this hotel in Hoi An. The room service was good, and the staff were all very kind and helpful. Special thanks to Uyên, Tuyền, and Trinh for their warm hospitality. We had a great night here and would happily recommend this place to others.

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel in the center of Hoian
sample_comments.positives: Very nice set up and facilities. Beautiful décoration and furniture. The ladies at the reception (Emma, Kimmi, Helen, and others) were very helpful and take 20mn when you arrive to orient you in the city.
sample_comments.negatives: Unfortunately my room on the third floor had a window on the internal stairs, the upside was that it was very quiet but not much of view

sample_comments.title: Cute and sweet place
sample_comments.text: Staffs are very nice, the hotel is very focusing on heritage education of Hoi An. If you are looking for something more in depth is a good place. They have a variety of activities and workshops linked up too. It's very convenient to join the local workshops, instead of looking for them on your own. The location is not bad, since it's in a quieter location, need to walk a bit to the old town city. But it's more peaceful. Breakfast is good too, providing a variety of local food

sample_comments.title: We would definitely recommend this hotel in Hoi An to anyone looking for a great location, nice room and wonderful staff
sample_comments.positives: Great location, very nice room and great staff. Helen was particularly helpful as we were preparing for our trip.

sample_comments.title: the great reviews are real
sample_comments.text: A great hotel. Clean. Comfortable. Charming.

sample_comments.title: The location was terrific and the staff, Kimmi, Tin, Emman and Spring were wonderful
sample_comments.positives: Great location and very nice rooms

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: The room was beautiful and charming, the bed and pillows were very comfortable, and the staff were incredibly friendly. Minh is super sweet and made the experience even better.

sample_comments.title: It's amazing
sample_comments.positives: Authenticity

sample_comments.title: Ideal for a stay near most places of interest
sample_comments.text: The facilities, location and the attention from the staff were outstanding. They also offer a few tours that are worth considering. It's close to most amenities but yet secluded enough that it feels quite peaceful. Very clean, spacious and comfortable. 100% recommended.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful and peaceful
sample_comments.positives: Best place is stayed at. Kind staff and clean facility. Exactly as described

sample_comments.title: Fantastic Stay at Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel
sample_comments.text: I had an absolutely wonderful stay at Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel! From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make my stay comfortable and memorable. A special shoutout to Ivy and Min, who truly embody excellent customer service. They are incredibly accommodating, always ready to help, and willing to go above and beyond with anything I needed. Min and Ivy deserve a raise! LOL I also really enjoyed the breakfast. It was delicious and a perfect start to the day. Overall, a fantastic experience and I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hoi An. Thanks again Min and Ivy! You both rock!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Wonderful staff! Thanks to Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma, and Gavy. I highly recommend the walking food tour, Old Town tour, and History lecture.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: This hotel is excellent value for money. The room was surprisingly big and very clean. It's in a nice location, only a short walk from the old town. I had a room with a breakfast. The breakfast was very good too. The 2 staff who I mostly encountered were Sunny and Julie. Both were very nice and super helpful. The hotel also offers bicycle & motorcycle hire at very reasonable rates and they help book excursions too. I highly recommend this hotel and would definitely stay there again.

sample_comments.title: Clean and affordable hotel, great location
sample_comments.positives: It was very clean and conveniently located

sample_comments.title: Exceptional hotel
sample_comments.text: This hotel is amazing! From warm welcome by very friendly and kind receptionists sharing knowledge about Hoi An, hospitality, attention to detail and to guests, and staff being proactive in making our stay exceptional. Location is brilliant - close walkable to old town but also quiet at night. Room has everything that is needed, and free complimentary water and welcome/goodbye small gifts were very thoughtful. I would definately stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Excellent stay and I am coming back there - next time longer
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were beautiful and have almost a Feng Shui feeling to them - everything is perfectly placed. I had a great night and wonderful stay. If you are there make definitely the town tour which starts at around 9:00 nearby. This tour was the best way to find out about the culture and history of the town and shows you also great food places. Its done by a woman who grew up there. Everybody was helpful and very service oriented - Helen helped me a lot there when arriving.
sample_comments.negatives: The only thing was that sometimes when you were served at the reception and some other guest came and needed something they were not queued but instead I had to wait - specifically in the morning when checking out this was stressful because I had some time pressure.

sample_comments.title: Cozy hotel with very welcoming staff
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located just far enough from the hustle and bustle of Hoi An Old Town, but close enough to easily walk there. Our hotel room was quite cozy, with traditional decorations and furniture.

When we arrived, Ms Xuân (Spring) gave us a warm welcome and gave us extensive information on what there's to do in Hoi An, greatly helping us plan our short stay in the area. She also recommended us an Ao Dai (traditional dress) rental and massage places, both at which we had great experiences. Other staff have also been very warm to us whenever we walked through the lobby.

Besides these experiences, they also offer laundry services at an affordable price and have free flow drip coffee at the lobby!

We highly recommend the hotel and would definitely stay here again on a repeat visit.

sample_comments.title: Excellent and very warm, helpful staff.
sample_comments.positives:
We had an excellent stay at this hotel! The service was outstanding from the moment we arrived until check-out. The staff were very welcoming, attentive, and always ready to help with anything we needed. They even have hotel transfort with good rates! And even recommends places to see and dine.
Our room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, which made our stay very relaxing. The surrounding area is quiet. The bathroom was super nice with a cute bathtub.
The overall atmosphere of the hotel was warm and inviting, and everything was well organized.
What truly stood out was the level of hospitality. The team went above and beyond to make sure guests felt comfortable and well taken care of. Shout out to Ms. Emma, Ms Spring and Mr. Tin! Thank you also for the cute gifts!
I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for superb service and a pleasant stay. I would definitely come back again!

sample_comments.title: Good Location, friendly staff
sample_comments.text: Location of hotel is good. Staff is friendly and helpful

sample_comments.title: A superb, meticulously run property that provides outstanding value for money.
sample_comments.positives: Clean; modern; comfortable (sensational bed); a wonderful soaking tub; welcoming, attentive staff; great tips about what to see and do while in Hoi An; outstanding location.

sample_comments.title: The staff are the real highlight
sample_comments.text: The hotel is beautiful and the location walking to each place is not bad. I recommend you get the room with bathtub as nice cool water is perfect to relax in after the heat. The staff were the best as I enjoyed conversation with all of them, the information provided is also very useful and I recommend listening to everythint. 5 stars ⭐

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Very helpful staff HELEN SPRING KIMMI EMMA GAVY

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: It is a boutique hotel that recently opened, with a retro style that is very stylish. The rooms are comfortable and have great views. Guests are welcomed with free mung bean cookies and unlimited drinking water. I would also like to especially praise a few front desk ladies: ***, ***, *** and ***, who greet us warmly every time we enter and exit the hotel. They also introduced us to great places to eat and have fun locally, which is really nice. The hotel is very clean and comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The staff -- Tin, Ivy, and Helen -- were extremely friendly and helpful!

sample_comments.title: great hospitality
sample_comments.text: great hospitality

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We stayed here for three nights on our honeymoon and can't say enough amazing things about it!! The staff, especially wonderful Helen, Ivy, and Min, were so so helpful, kind, attentive, and caring and made it feel like home!!! They went above and beyond. They helped us arrange tours, gave us amazing information and the hotel was cozy and beautiful!

sample_comments.title: Best Hospitality Experience We've Ever Had in Vietnam
sample_comments.text:
My wife and I have traveled all over Vietnam, staying in both 3-star hotels and luxury resorts, but we have never experienced service as exceptional as this.

The hotel was clean, comfortable, and perfectly located near all the popular spots in Hoi An. What truly made our stay unforgettable was the staff everyone was incredibly kind, helpful, and made us feel right at home.

A huge thank you to Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma, Gavy, and Tin for their outstanding hospitality and care throughout our stay. This has honestly been one of the best hotel experiences of our lives.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel with friendly staff and delicious breakfast
sample_comments.positives: Min was a great host. Breakfast was delicious and filling. Location was convenient to the ancient city. Really enjoyed the free walking tour.
sample_comments.negatives: We were not a fan of the shower.

sample_comments.title: The Hotel experience is charming, cultural, with something special gained by guests fortunate enough to experience.
sample_comments.text: My 2nd stay in a week down from Danang as the initial time spent was so uniquely charming friendly like a family. Most unique and delightful feeling. I cannot recommend the incredible staff whom work so proudly in their home town and share the wonder of this magnificent area..

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
This was one of the best stays I have ever had while traveling. The staff truly set this hotel apart from any other I have been to- Ivy, Min, and Helen were beyond incredible, they were personable and genuinely cared about me as a guest. I have never experienced such great service, they went above and beyond for me from the second I walked into the hotel until I left.

I booked my room at 09:00 after a terrible night in another local hotel. I was unfortunately not able to sleep and asked Hoianese if it would be possible for me to check in early so I could get some sleep. When I arrived at 10:00, they already had my room ready for me and were genuinely concerned that I get some rest. They were so sweet and checked on me later that day to make sure I was feeling better, they remembered my name the entire time I was on the property, and were always more than eager to help with anything I needed. 

The property was also wonderful. The hotel was a short walk to Old Town- a great location away from all the noise and chaos of the main streets. The room was bright, clean and spacious, and the bed was incredibly comfortable. The area and hotel felt very safe- even walking at night as a solo female traveler. A true sanctuary, I could not recommend Hoianese more and am very grateful to have found it.

sample_comments.title: Great time!
sample_comments.text: We had an amazing time here. The hotel was nice, the staff was amazing. They cared and it showed. Kimmi and Spring were so helpful! Their recommendations were spot on, their attitude was perfect. I can not praise them enough!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The staff was outstanding.

sample_comments.title: Kindest staff ever
sample_comments.text: Had a warm welcoming stay at Hoianese Hotel. Thank you to Helen, Emma, Kimmi & Spring for making this a pleasant stay

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: They are very friendly at the hotel, especially Helen and Covy, a nice hotel and a very good breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Staffs are SUPER
sample_comments.text: I stayed for a few nights and staffs are SUPER NICE !!!! Kimmi, Spring, Emma every one were GREAT!!!!!! I prefer to use less plastic bottle for water and the hotel provided water in glass bottle every day. There is also a cafe/dining area if you want to make yourself a Vietnamese Coffee, or Ginger Tea, or just to dine with a table. Everytime I am at the reception the staffs said hi and chat a bit, giving me a vibe at the hostel in terms of great hospitality -- it made me feel like HOME! The staff is super helpful in terms of providing information for tourists activities and dinning places. I registered a history talk at other Hoianese hotel, which is only about 10 -15 mins walking distance, which I appreciate a hotel to host such activities. The recommended dinning places for Banh Mi, Chicken rice etc... are mainly not with AC but they are cheap and good! Even if you do not have a plan what to do in Hoi An, the hotel and the staffs can definitely give you some insights! The hotel locates at around 15 mins walking distance to the old town. It may be some distance in the afternoon but it also provides you with some quiet neighborhood. When I checked-out they also gave me a small gift! The hotel is also walking distance (5 mins) from a 24/7 self-laundry site. The hotel also provides laundry services. I would definitely come back if I visit Hoi An again!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The property was very clean and the staff were amazing! Gavy explained all there was to see in Hoi An and suggested some shows/places that we went and loved! Ivy was also very friendly and sweet. We loved it here and will be booking another night before we leave.

sample_comments.title: Value-for-money stay with amazing service
sample_comments.text:
Although I only stayed for one night, I had a great experience. The staff (Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma) were all so welcoming and lovely. They gave me a rundown of all the spots to hit and their recommendations. 

Traditional snacks were also offered at the start of my stay and there was even a small souvenir before I left. Room was clean, although walls were a little thin. It's about a 5-10 minute walk from the old town. Will definitely revisit when I'm back!

sample_comments.title: Lim and ivy were great!!!
sample_comments.positives: The staff, location, absolutely convenient and also very professional attitude towards the guests. Thank you all from the bottom of my of my heart.

sample_comments.title: Perfect location and clean accommodation.
sample_comments.text: The accessibility on foot was excellent, and the amenities in the room and the bathroom condition were very satisfying. Thanks to the friendly attitudes of the staff (Spring, Kimmi) and the clean hygiene conditions, I was able to have a pleasant time. The Wi-Fi was also reliably connected and convenient. There was a scooter rental system available in the hotel, and the breakfast was excellent and very quiet. Overall, the satisfaction relative to the price is very high, making it a place I would recommend to anyone!

sample_comments.title: A nice surprise
sample_comments.positives: The staff welcomed us in a really nice way and helped us to organize our activities. They were also on call 24h in case of need. Our room was pleasant, clean, with all the facilities we needed. Breakfast was super good. We also did a very nice walking tour organized by the hotel chain. I highly recommend this place

sample_comments.title: Having a wonderful time!
sample_comments.text: We had a great time here. The staff were incredibly kind (especially thanks to Kimmy) and provided us with very helpful information about Hoi An. It truly felt like visiting a friend's home. Regarding the room, we chose a very basic option, so there was no view or special advantage, but it was simple and clean. If I have the chance to visit Hoi An again, I would definitely stay here.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful hotel that helps with everything! Amazing breakfast. Be sure to take the bike tour to Cam Kin with Bao - one
sample_comments.positives: Wonderful hotel that helps with everything! Amazing breakfast. Be sure to take the bike tour to Cam Kin with Bao - one of our most memorable experiences.

sample_comments.title: Outstanding Staff, Unforgettable Stay
sample_comments.text:
Very happy overall with my stay. The hotel is well-kept, comfortable, and in a great location. But what really sets it apart is the staff.
Kimmi, Helen, and Emma were all friendly and attentive throughout.

Special shoutout to Spring, who went above and beyond when I first arrived --- she took the time to orient me to the area, gave me food and activity recommendations, and helped me figure out logistics for tours and transport. That kind of personal attention made a real difference, especially as a solo traveler.

Every aspect of the stay was handled well. Top-notch service across the board. Honestly one of the highlights of my entire Vietnam trip!

Highly recommended. Will absolutely be staying here again next time I'm in Hội An!

sample_comments.title: Super friendly, beautiful, clean hotel next to the heart of Hoi an
sample_comments.positives: The hotel staff was amazing. They were so helpful and friendly and the free tours were amazing as well. The breakfast was also huge and so great. I would definitely come back to stay here.

sample_comments.title: exceptional staff
sample_comments.text: It was the wonderful and attentive staff that made this accommodation so special. Highly recommended.

sample_comments.title: I would recommend anyone to stay here
sample_comments.positives: This was really the perfect stay in Hoi An - I couldnt have asked for better. From the moment you check-in you are greeted with the kindness and care from Sunny and Julie - Sunny gave me great information about Hoi An and helped me schedule some tours to make the most of my stay in Hoi An. The room was perfect - so clean and the bath/shower was so nice - the design overall was top notch.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful place
sample_comments.text: I loved everything about this place the location the staff the rooms everything! :)

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay for local culture and experience!
sample_comments.positives: We absolutely loved this hotel, it's in a really decent location just a short walk - 5 mins from the river! The room was clean and the bed really comfy. The real stand out for us was the staff! Ivy & Helen were absolutely amazing, they gave us all the local spots to go to, booked us a private coconut boat with a local company which was much cheaper than some of the tourist traps. They booked us the best table at Morning Glory restaurant (must visit, food is 10/10!). We also did a free walking tour which was run by the hotel and we loved it! We can't thank them enough for looking after us and being on WhatsApp for throughout the day for whatever we needed. We would definitely go back!
sample_comments.negatives: The shower is in the bath, so if you're tall (over 6ft) you might struggle, and the bath is small. This could be unique to our room though!

sample_comments.title: Perfect stay
sample_comments.text: This this place is definitely a 10 out of 10 THE best place I stayed in Hoi An visiting 4 times. Absolutely no complaints the staff was amazing and the place is beautiful clean and in the perfect location. This will now be my home away from home when I visit again.

sample_comments.title: The staff went all out and did an amazing job!
sample_comments.positives: Lovely

sample_comments.title: Long lasting memories
sample_comments.text:
My friend and I stayed 5 nights at this place. We were amazed immediately on our first day. There were 4 service members named Helen, Kimmi, Emma, and Spring who have created a memory of, not just the hotel, Hoi An that will stay with us forever. As soon as we checked in, they remembered our names and have greeted us by our names thereafter. Helen planned out every day activities for us. The 4 of these ladies in turn take time to book shows/tours for us (per our requests). When time for breakfast, these ladies would bring breakfast, whatever we ordered, to us. As many times as we need. On the mornings that we got picked up early for tours, they would packed breakfast in brown bags for us to bring along. I remember telling my friend...they remind me of my wife who would pack lunch for me when I had to leave for the whole day. Bao is a great tour guide. From Bao, I learned a great deal of Hoi An history and VietNam as a whole.
In the end, it's not about a grand, glittering, fancy and pretentious hotel. It's all about the kindness, the smiles and the "hello" I received every time I left and when I returned that make this place memorable. To me, it's not a hotel . To me, it's my private vacation home. The staff at this place have given me a wonderful experience and a long lasting memory. Every time I speak of Hoi An, I will think of the staff at Hoianese Old Town Hotel. They will always have a special place in my heart.

sample_comments.title: Best Experience in Hoi An
sample_comments.positives: Couldn't be better. Excellent little hotel group focused on showcasing Hoi An's culture and history. Service was beyond exceptional - Min, Ivy, and Helen especially were so helpful. We enjoyed visiting Hoi An and signed up for the Memories show, the coffee course, and the cooking course all through the hotel, which had clearly vetted the many options throughout the city and found the best quality ones. We also loved the history tour organized by the hotel and run by Bao, who is so passionate and friendly. We extended our three day stay to four days because there was so much to do and we felt so comfortable. We only wish we had longer still!

sample_comments.title: Best hotel ever
sample_comments.text:
They are best in hospitality.
Kimmi, emma, spring, helen we are grateful to you all for the exceptional hospitality. 

Also we forgot our bag when we checked out for the airport, they were kind enough to help us out by sending a driver quickly with the bag and saving our trip. 

They go over and beyond to help out the ones staying at the hotel. And even suggest places and free tours to boost your stay

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Helen, Min, Ivy and Emma they're the best team we have seen in our travel in Vietnam. The rooms in the hotel very clean and comfortable. The hotel located in quiet street, just ten minutes from the old town. I highly recommend to stay here if you intend to visit in Hoi An. And they surprised us on my wife's birthday day, they decorated our room and even brought us a cake!!

sample_comments.title: Hospitality at its best.
sample_comments.text: I was impressed by the staff's attentive service. Including the email exchanges before and after, I received the best hospitality. The old town is also within walking distance, which was very nice. Thank you, spring.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel in quiet location
sample_comments.positives: Fabulous staff! Helen, Min, Ivy, Emma and Thao. They were so attentive, helped book tours and transport. Food was excellent. Free tea and coffee all day. Beautiful rooms. Clean and comfortable. Only 5 minutes walk from old town

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Been to alot of hotels in Vietnam but this was the best! Exceptional hotel staff!

sample_comments.title: Perfect stay in Hoi An!
sample_comments.positives: This was our favourite stay in all of Vietnam! Ivy, Min, and Helen are the friendliest and most helpful staff we've encountered. They helped us with advice on what to do, tours, and helped us with transportation. We loved chatting with them every time we entered or exited. The hotel was super clean, well designed, and located in a very convenient location close to Old Town. The rooms were spacious, the bed was soooo comfyyyy, and we appreciated the storage and big bathrooms. We liked that the hotel was designed with Asian elements to give it a sense of culture and history. The breakfasts were soo good, tons of food with juice and fruits, and interesting Hoi An and western options. I would 100% stay here again and recommend this to anyone else looking for a place in Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: A very good stay
sample_comments.text: Staff was very friendly and helpful, especially Helen and Kimmy ! The breakfasts were great, the free walking tour they suggested was very insightful and interesting and the room was well cleaned! We totally recommend this hotel

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

The best experience I had ever had in a hotel 
Perfect location l, close to the old town and the tailors but far enough so you won't hear the noise. The rooms are big and clean and the water pressure is the best I had in Vietnam. There was available room so I got upgraded room without extra pay. Thanks to the hotel stuff that were the most important part in the great experience I had. Thank you Helen, Emma,Tun,Min and most importantly Ivy 
Each problem or question I had they had a sulotion or an answer. 
P.s I came with a friend and we separated in hoi an because he wanted to go to a more expensive hotel. He paid 5 million dongs and was surprised from the great treatment I got in my way cheaper hotel

sample_comments.title: Exceptional stay!

Very friendly staff, nice clean rooms. Comfortable stay.
Breakfast was good. It was one of the best stays within budget.

sample_comments.title: Highly Recommended in Hoi An

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

sample_comments.title: Gem in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Located in a quiet part of Hoi an. Offers very good breakfast, free coffee and tea. Rooms are big and clean. Staff are very warm, friendly and service oriented.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Impeccible customer services, explained with a map and activities as soon as I checked in. The room was amazing and clean. The location was also very good and the staff was extremely helpful.

sample_comments.title: What a great Place

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
