Everything. The hotel is exceptionally welcoming and made us feel right at home. A lot of attractions available for booking at the front desk. The rooms are exceptionally comfortable, the beds are fantastic. Spacious clean and spotless.
Coffee and tea available freely all day.
Special thanks to the lovely staff: Min and Helen, who made our stay extra warm and inviting.

sample_comments.title: A terrific boutique hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is less than 10 minutes walk to old town and the main sites so well situated. Room was quiet and well appointed. Had many options for breakfast and portions were large and food was excellent. Really good. They also offered a number of tours and helped me arrange a private tour by motorcycle to Hue. over the Hai Van Pass. The service was just great and the staff- Helen. Ivy and Min (hopefully got names right) couldn't have been more helpful. Room was spotless. Would highly recommend if staying in Hou An. Great value too.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Another great stay at Hoianese! I have traveled around southeast Asia for 8 months now and Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel has been the best place I've stayed- so great that I came back a second time! They treat all their guests like family and give great recommendations for activities, tailors, or local restaurants around Hoi An while also teaching you to make local Vietnamese coffee in the lobby.

The rooms here are also in great condition- you are greeted with cold bottles of water, a very comfy bed, and clean towels each morning, making for a great place to unwind after a long day exploring the town.

A special thanks to Tien, Min, and Helen who made my 2nd stay in Hoi An so unforgettable- I hope to make another trip back to see them again soon!

sample_comments.title: One of the best Hotels
sample_comments.text: Me and my wife love this place. Very quiet and friendly and clean. Very professional staffs.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We had a great stay! The staff were super friendly and always happy to help, and even the housekeeping team was so kind and caring. The location is perfect, the rooms are newly renovated and very comfortable, and the hotel offers great tips, fair prices, and fun workshops. The breakfast is wonderful. Special thanks to Min and Tim for their amazing help - you made our stay extra special!

sample_comments.title: Receptionist made our journey great
sample_comments.text: Thankyou Helen, Emma, Ivy and Min for your help, kindness and guidance with booking

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The absolute best staff. Lovely facilities and easily walkable location. Great amenities like refillable water and comfortable beds.

sample_comments.title: Best hotel I stayed at, amazing staff!
sample_comments.text: Defintely one of the best cozy hotels I stayed at, the owners put so much thoughts into the hotel and amenities. The staff Ivy, Min and Helen, were graciously nice and friendly. Especially Ivy, she's smart and studious, and helpful of course! I even received a surprising bookmark gift from Ivy! One of the most memorable experiences and Hội An has been a wonderful place to visit!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The staff service.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Exceptional place to stay. Everyone there is so friendly especially Min, Helen and Ivy. The breakfast is delicious and huge and they give you a full run down of the best tourist attractions, places to eat and tailors. We've already recommended our friends who are coming to Hoi An to stay here.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Central, clean, well designed 
Staff is super helpful especially Helen and Min, they really do their best to make your stay memorable and enoyable

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay
sample_comments.text: The hotel had one of the best service staff that I have ever experienced. I was planning a marriage proposal this trip and the team helped out tremendously, going above and beyond to assist me, including getting a rose bouquet, setting up the whole room with props and also helping us with recording the special live moment. HUGE shout-out to Helen, Hannah, Min, Emma and Ivy for making our stay in Hoi An truly amazing and truly Hoianese. Helen in particular helped a lot in terms of the overall coordination, and we are grateful for that. Hannah and Nina (or Lina?) and another staff that helped us capture the lovely moments on camera, and even the housekeeping lady that helped with the decoration. Super happy with our stay and we really hope to be back again soon!

sample_comments.title: Incomparable
sample_comments.positives: The staff - Gavy and Helen - were an absolute joy. And the room was comforting. Because of my experience there, I'd always associate Hoi An with peace and relaxation.

sample_comments.title: Delightful Experience At Quaint Hoianese
sample_comments.text:
Welcomed by the friendly and helpful staff at Hoianese, we enjoyed our stay at this little gem of a hotel in Hoi An. Kudos to Emma, Helen, Ivy and Min. 
The room was well-appointed, the all-day coffee and tea bar was refreshing, and the breakfast on order was more than generous. 
Thank you for the transport arrangements. The gift upon checkout is well-appreciated.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: By far the nicest staff I have ever met.

sample_comments.title: I want to praise myself for being able to find a hotel like this.
sample_comments.text:
During my third trip to Vietnam, I visited Hoi An for the first time. The Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel is located slightly outside the main tourist area of the old town, on a quiet street away from the hustle and bustle. (It's just right for strolling through the streets on foot.)

Upon check-in, staff member Helen kindly explained about Hoi An while brewing Vietnamese coffee for me. Although my English was limited, she patiently assisted me.

They provide a wealth of information and tours very thoroughly. I believe their hospitality reflects a desire for visitors to fully enjoy Hoi An, rather than just attempting to sell tours.

During Helen's guidance, there was a coffee workshop where we experienced making iconic Vietnamese coffees such as egg coffee, salt coffee, and coconut coffee ourselves. For more details, you can visit Tropical Cafe & Bistro.

I cycled to this cafe using the rental bicycles from the hotel, which was also very affordable at 50,000 VND for a day.

Now, back to the hotel; the room was cute, clean, and the king-sized bed allowed for a comfortable stay. If I had to point out something, it would be that the bathroom light and fan share the same switch, which means you can't run the fan without turning off the light. That's about the only issue in what is otherwise an excellent hotel.

I would like to compliment myself on finding such a hotel. Thank you to Helen and all the staff!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Xin and Gavi were really nice and warm to me, they were kind and helpful in my experience. Thanks for everything

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Hoianese hotel was the highlight of my trip to Hoi An. The team (Ivy, Min, Helen, and Emma) was so helpful, friendly, the best team you can imagine. 

The hotel is arranging history talk and walking tour (Free!). It is the best way to learn about Hoi An and Vietnam. I think without these activities, I wouldn't understand and enjoy much in Hoi An. Also, they are giving excellent recommendations for food and tailoring so you won't get scammed. 

The room was spacious, very clean, have all amenities needed even umbrella. 

Breakfast service was excellent. There are local and western food and you can choose more than one item. 

Location was superb. Just 5 mins walk to old town. 

They even prepped farewell gift for me Everything was just excellent!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: From Check-in until Check-Out a superb experience. Charming, clean Rooms, Amazing Staff, especially Min and Helen made my stay not only a memorable one, both shared their knowledge of this magical place due to the rich history of Vietnam and Hoi An itself. Cám Ơn

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Amazing stay. Highlight of the trip

sample_comments.title: Great value
sample_comments.positives: I'm so happy i booked this hotel. Everything is perfect! Min and Helen texted me in what's app a few days before we arrive, very professional. And Emma always take good care of us. All the ladies at the house keeping is always smile and work hard. I want them to work for me haha! Don't search for any other hotel, book this one trust me and thank me later!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Sangat rekomended utk yang mau stay di Hoi An karena hotel staff reception nya (Ming) sangat friendly dan informatif menjelaskan serta memberikan hospitality terbaik, termasuk menjelaskan beberapa objek wisata di Hoi An dan rekomendasinya. Kamar nya enak ad bathub nya dan free flow vietnam coffee di lobby.
Hotel memberikan free walking tour dengan tour guide Cindy (sangat recomended utk diambil agar mengerti sejarah kota Hoi An)

sample_comments.title: I will be back here every time I visit Hoi An!
sample_comments.positives: Most of all: the staff. The young girls, Helen, Min, and Judy were all sweet, courteous, helpful, and professional. No complaints about the facility either. Clean, beautiful, spacious room. Walking distance to old town, neighboring main streets and shops (there's a Highland coffee shop right at the corner where you can chill and shield yourself from the burning sun). This hotel chain doesn't just provide tourists with a place to stay; they want to provide you a cultural experience. Make sure you look at their brochure, filled with recommendations for activities and good places to eat. Very good value for what i paid!!!

sample_comments.title: Great stay
sample_comments.text:
From the moment we walked in we enjoyed staying in the Town Hotel. 
Min, Ivy and Helen have been super helpful and professional, we got a free upgrade and the free walking tour was really great! 
Highly recommended!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
I felt right at home the moment I arrived---everyone at check-in welcomed me like family, which inspired me to extend my stay to nearly two weeks! The rooms are comfortable, well-equipped, close to the old town, and perfect for anyone visiting Hoi An.
The staff truly made my stay exceptional. Tata, Emma, Helen, and Min always greeted me with smiles and daily activity suggestions, while Bao and Cindy were fantastic local guides. Tien even took me to a local fish market to see fishermen bringing in their fresh catch---an unforgettable experience.
Thanks to the amazing team, my time at Hoianese was incredibly special. I hope to return soon and highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Hoi An!

sample_comments.title: Highly recommend for travelers
sample_comments.text: Khách sạn gần phố cổ, vị trí thuận tiện. Các bạn nhân viên rất hiếu khách và dễ thương. Quầy cafe vietnam ở lobby pha cho khách rất ngon. Ngày đầu tiên tới Hội An đã được bạn Ivy giới thiệu các địa điểm thú vị và đc book vé show Hoian memories với giá tốt, show Terdah xuất sắc. Phòng sạch sẽ, rộng rãi, bồn tắm thoải mái, wifi mạnh, giá phòng hợp lý, các bạn Uyên, Tuyền, Trinh service tốt. Cuối ngày checkout đc tặng souvenir làng gốm rất đáng yêu. Chắc chắn sẽ quay lại nếu có dịp và highly recommend cho khách du lịch vì ở đây có free city walking tour và history talk bao gồm trong service

sample_comments.title: I would certainly return to stay at this hotel again as it was a great location, exceptional staff, and a lovely hotel o
sample_comments.positives: The receptionists were ALL amazing. Especially Helen and Min. The breakfasts were great. Help with knowing what to do and where to go was excellent as were the discounts for different tours. The room was just LOVELY as was the view. I enjoyed being in a quiet space but 5-7 min walk away from Old Town. Which is a relief to not be in the middle of such chaos. There are great cafes and restaurants and spas right nearby. They offer efficient laundry services and help with shipping services (if you buy too much in Hoi An to fit in your luggage). There is ample toilet paper!! Overall a really lovely experience.
sample_comments.negatives: It would be great to have a little swimming pool to cool off in during the HOT days and a few more tables indoors for breakfast time as it gets crowded.

sample_comments.title: Amazing Hoi An Trip
sample_comments.text: I had a fun and wonderful trip at Hoi An. Thanks to Hoianese Quiet Old Town staffs, Min, Ivy and Helen for their hospitality and informative service to ease my trip planning. Special mentioning to Min, whom provided excellent service,, friendly, candid and gave me useful tips to explore Hoi An and interesting places of attraction with guided tour option. Fabulous trip indeed!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Thanks to the administration for the perfect service and quality of every little thing in this amazing hotel! Additionally, there is lots of respect to these extremely friendly reception ladies: Helen, Min, and Judy. There's everyone is doing a great job!
Best wishes

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Stay - Highly Recommended!
sample_comments.text:
I had a wonderful stay at Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel, and the experience exceeded my expectations in every way. Right from the beginning, I was pleasantly surprised with a complimentary deluxe room upgrade, which set the tone for a fantastic stay.

A special thanks to Min, who provided incredibly detailed and helpful information about activities around Hoi An and thoughtfully helped me plan my 3-day itinerary. His guidance made my trip smooth and memorable.

Helen, Ivy, Min, and Emma truly went above and beyond---always warm, attentive, and extremely prompt in assisting with anything I needed. Their hospitality made me feel genuinely cared for throughout my stay.

I also really appreciated the early breakfast arrangements whenever I had to leave early for my trips---such a thoughtful and guest-focused service.

Overall, I am super happy with my stay and would definitely recommend this hotel to my family and friends.

Highly recommended ---I would love to stay here again!

sample_comments.title: The best hotel experience in Hoi An is at Hoianese!
sample_comments.positives: I travel full time and this has been my favorite hotel in all my travels. I stayed at Hoianese Old Town Boutique hotel for a month and was treated like family. The staff is so kind and friendly. Between the front desk staff and the housekeeping staff, they made me feel loved and appreciated as a guest. My room was outstanding - large, comfortable, clean, and included everything I needed for a long stay. The hotel amenities (free cold water, free bikes to borrow, free coffee, laundry service, etc.) were appreciated. The housekeeping staff keeps everything so clean and fresh, it's quite impressive. They are so kind, too! The hotel is peaceful and quiet, while offering some great activities (I loved the walking tour with Bao!). Although the hotel was luxurious with many amenities, it felt like an intimate homestay where you get to know everyone. I was sad to leave the hotel and staff, and I look forward to coming back to stay soon. I would not stay anywhere else in the Ancient Town area - this hotel is truly a sparkling gem. In addition to being treated so well by the entire housekeeping staff, a few members of the front desk staff genuinely made my stay amazing. Thank you to Helen, Min, Judy, and the rest of the lovely team!
sample_comments.negatives: Although I believe these to be honest mistakes that could have been made anywhere, staff members did accidentally enter my room without knocking a couple of times. One time this happened in the middle of the night with a male staff member, but Helen (front desk staff) was so kind to take care of me and make sure I was okay. As a solo female traveler, it was a bit of a scary experience for me but I really felt good about how things were handled, and I felt fully supported and cared for. I would not let these incidents stop me from staying here again. Everyone truly cared about my comfort, happiness, and well-being.

sample_comments.title: A place that needs no more words!
sample_comments.text: This place is where truly special staff work. The rooms and bathrooms are great, the bedding is comfortable, and the breakfast is just right, making it a very comfortable and enjoyable place during my stay. I plan to stay here again next time I visit Hoi An. Highly recommended! All the staff are very friendly, cheerful, and polite, and the hospitality and warmth from the four people at the reception were the best! Thank you to Helen, Min, Emma, and Ivy~

sample_comments.title: An exceptional experience that I'd happily repeat
sample_comments.positives: The room was absolutely comfortable and cozy. Every detail was thoughtfully arranged, making the space feel warm and inviting. They even helped us organize our next visit. I truly loved my stay and would definitely return.
sample_comments.negatives: There was nothing i didn't like. Everything was great

sample_comments.title: Unique hotel in Hoian
sample_comments.text:
Great location for visiting all the sites you want- Japanese bridge, river, lantern street and old houses
 But the real gem is the staff reception with Ivy, Nim, Helen and Emma.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Best hotel in Hoian!
We stayed for a week and had the best time. The hotel is very clean and they clean the room everyday, the bed is so comfortable and the a/c work great.
The hotel is walking distance from everything in the city. 
The staff is so friendly and helpful, especially Min, Helen and Judy! They welcomed us with big smiles, gave us so many recommendations for Hoian and helped us with everything we needed.
I couldn't recommend this hotel enough!
sample_comments.negatives: There was a problem in the shower that the water temperature was unstable.

sample_comments.title: Awesome staff
sample_comments.text: Amazing stay. i forgot a computer accessory in their hotel room. They even helped me to get the product to my new location bu courier. Best hotel

sample_comments.title: Comfortable
sample_comments.positives: Staff were very friendly and gave us recommendations for local restaurants, tailors and tours. The free history talk organized by the hotel was amazing - would highly recommend!

sample_comments.title: Excellent hotel with the friendliest staff
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is beautiful, clean, and in the perfect location to explore Hoian. My room was large, had a very comfortable bed with high-end linens, and a bathtub! 
The staff was very helpful and always greeted you with a smile. The hotel offers a free history talk at it's sister hotel. Bao was passionate and informative. Also, I did the food tour with Cindy. She's a delight and the food was authentic and delicious. Highly recommend both

sample_comments.title: Wonderful place to stay
sample_comments.positives: Free drinking water in the lobby, breakfast was a great portion, staff were super helpful (thank you Helen, Judy and Min!), the free walking tour was a plus, good location. We were also given a pamphlet with recommendations for food and tailors and activities which made our time in Hoi a very enjoyable.

sample_comments.title: A clean hotel with good service.
sample_comments.text: Clean and good service at a reasonable price. There are friendly and passionate staff, especially Min Ivy Nguyen, who provided very kind assistance, which was impressive. I recommend adding breakfast when making a reservation. With the breakfast added, you can eat to your heart's content.

sample_comments.title: Great place, near old town, with a luxurious touch for a good price
sample_comments.positives: I loved everything! The design of the room was great, spacious, good light, comfortable bed and the bathtub amazing!!! Very clean. Good location walking distance from the old town. You can also rent a bike. The best definitely the ladies from reception, big thanks to Helen, Judy and Min for making my holiday in Hoi An an unforgettable experience! The tours they recommended were great, they explained and arranged everything. I also hired the laundry service.

sample_comments.title: Super Friendly Staff
sample_comments.text: Min, Helen, and Ivy were super friendly and helpful. They made me feel welcome from the moment I walked in. I will definitely stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Super comfortable bed and amazing sleep if you want to relax. Only thing I would suggest is the shower in the bathroom might be suitable for elderly people or people with disabilities as you have climb into the tub.

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel
sample_comments.text:
We only stayed one night at Hoianese Old Town, but it immediately impressed us --- the room was spacious, comfortable, and far better than we expected. The staff were absolutely wonderful, always smiling and ready with helpful recommendations on what to see and do in the area.

Unfortunately, we woke up the next morning to find the hotel flooded. Even in the flooded reception area, the staff went above and beyond --- they prepared breakfast for us despite the chaos! Later, we had to evacuate on a boat, and throughout the entire experience, the staff remained cheerful and supportive, which was truly remarkable.

sample_comments.title: Best staff
sample_comments.positives: The best thing at this hotel for me was the staff. Very friendly, polite and invested in making your stay the best possible experience you can get. Min, Julie and Suny were great. Catered to all my needs before I could even express them. Location was great too, close to different shops and restaurants and the room was clean with everything in it working properly. Will surely return as soon as I have the opportunity.

sample_comments.title: I recommend it.
sample_comments.text: This accommodation was booked because of the good reviews here, and the staff were really friendly and the place was to my liking. Although I couldn't stay properly due to the flood, which was very disappointing (they refunded me even though I didn't ask for it), I will definitely visit again with my whole family next time. This time, I traveled for a month in Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, and Hoi An, and among many hotels, this is the one that showed the most friendliness. The room is excellent for the price.

sample_comments.title: Value
sample_comments.positives: Value for money
sample_comments.negatives: They should know more about the experiences they've selling.

sample_comments.title: Perfect Hoi An Stay
sample_comments.text: Great place with incredibly friendly staff. You should check out the flood!

sample_comments.title: Great stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.positives: Everything here is good especially the staffs. They are the best about the property. Hieu, Tina, and Julie are so kind and we love their hospitality.

sample_comments.title: Absolutely amazing
sample_comments.text: This was one of my favourite hotels in my hotel 6 months ago trip around Asia. The staff were the most lovely and helpful people ever and the room was very spacious and comfortable. The breakfast was also amazing.

sample_comments.title: Comfortably kind!
sample_comments.positives:
The place is amazing it combines the old with the new in a very good taste. The stuff was kind and helped me even before getting there, they even facilitate me with a car from Da Nang. They helped me with tours and maps of where to go and what to do in my short time. They were definitely the best part of my staying there.
Julie, Henri and specially Min 
Thank you so much!

sample_comments.title: Just perfect stay for Hoi An
sample_comments.text: We loved our stay. Clean organized friendly staff (they explained everything) amazing design, excellent price great breakfast. Would definitely recommend as the preferred option for Hoi An

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Everything! The staff were amazing, the food was fantastic, the location was spectacular, etc. I would definitely recommend staying here.

sample_comments.title: Charming Boutique Hotel In The Heart of Old Town Hoi An
sample_comments.text: This quaint boutique hotel is located in a quiet neighborhood within walking distance to the Old Town shopping district. The staff go above and beyond to ensure guests are comfortable and enjoy their stay. A variety of tour options are available. The breakfast is excellent. Highly recommend this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
We had a great stay at Hoianese Ancient Hostel! The staff were super helpful, especially Min---she answered all our questions, helped us book tours, and gave really good local recommendations. Our first room had some issues with the air conditioning not cooling enough, but they moved us to a different room right away, which we really appreciated.

There was a power outage from 4am to 8am during our stay, but it wasn't too bad---there was still light and we could charge our phones. The aircon wasn't working during that time, but the hostel gave us a small refund for the inconvenience, which was really thoughtful.

The rooms are clean, very spacious, and comfortable. Would definitely recommend staying here if you're visiting Hoi An!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Stay - Highly Recommended
sample_comments.text: We had a wonderful stay! The hotel is beautiful and conveniently located near the Old Town. Our room was upgraded to a villa with a lovely balcony view, and the service was truly exceptional. They also offer a complete program of activities to choose from, they are really helping the guests to maximize their Hoi An experience. The free walking tour is highly recommended which made our stay even more memorable.

sample_comments.title: Will comeback again!
sample_comments.positives: Compare to the price, I can say that the room, location, and the service is absolutely amazing. The room is very comfortale, the design is good as well, with Hoi An vibe. Location is super near the Ancient town, just need to walk a little bit. The best is the service, the receptionist is a star - Min. She is very gentle and helpful.

sample_comments.title: Best stay
sample_comments.text: Im stay in here is really the best choices, easy to go everywhere, my family love it soo much, more over the staff a really friendly and helpfull, they know everything, definitely will coming stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Thank you Sunny for your attentions!
sample_comments.positives: Staff was so friendly and welcoming, service was great. They offer great tours. Room super clean and comfortable

sample_comments.title: Finest Hotel on my 3 month trip
sample_comments.text: I like the hotel a lot and would like to stay much longer

sample_comments.title: Perfect hospitality
sample_comments.positives: Loved our stay here. Our first day we watched Sunny and Julie wave goodbye to guests after hugs and I thought "hmmm, I can't imagine have such strong feelings about hotel staff" but boy was I wrong. From the jump Sunny, Julie, and Helen took great care of us. They presented us with a map and a lot of recommendations for our time in Hoi An. Sunny taught us to make Vietnamese coffee and they have a self service station that is always open. The architecture of the hotel is beautiful and the room wasn't huge but perfectly spacious for our needs (we got the most basic room as well). The ac was powerful but just a note for anyone who didn't see that the rooms do not have TVs (which we actually liked). The location was amazing as well. A five minute walk to the old town but down a beautiful, quiet lantern lined street. I had an unfortunate issue with some of my camera equipment in the old town and Sunny and the reception staff went out of their way to help me resolve it. The availability of cold drinking water was so pleasant as well as the access to coffee on demand. My partner was actually obsessed with the banana pancakes he got at breakfast and they make the best passion fruit juice I've ever had anywhere. The only small improvements I could offer would be a more protective glass barrier around the shower. All and all a top notch stay, great value for money, wonderful location, and unbelievable hospitality from everyone who works there. We can't wait to return.

sample_comments.title: A very nice hotel in a good location
sample_comments.text: Front desk is great! Very helpful and full of knowledge about local things to do, foods and shops. All the recommendations we tried were spot-on. the hotel is new and very clean. Old town is only about 8 mins walk on a quiet street.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel and staff.
sample_comments.positives: Great hotel and staff! Everything you need for a great stay.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Hospitality
sample_comments.text: I had a truly wonderful experience staying at the Hoianese hotel, where the friendly, welcoming, and helpful front desk team created an amazing vibe. A special thanks to all the exceptional staff, especially Min, Helen, and Julie, for their amazing hospitality. They patiently explained the local culture and gave me many thoughtful recommendations, which made me feel right at home. The hotel is clean, nice, and quiet, and its perfect location is within walking distance of the old quarter. I enjoyed my time here and will definitely come back!

sample_comments.title: Lovely two nights in charming Hanoi
sample_comments.positives: The location was amazing and the receptionists were so helpful and informative, especially Helen. The rooms are super clean, spacious and the free coffee and water were a lovely touch :) they were also incredibly generous to let us shower after we checked out! We definitely will stay here again in Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: Perfect stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text:
This is one of the best ever hotels I have ever stayed in.
Good rooms, close to Market and exceptional staff.
Staff is so helpful, polite and cheerful that you will feel at home.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: I had an amazing experience in this hotel. The price is affordable and the location is not far from the main attractions. Especially front desk services Sunny, Helen, and Min are extremely helpful and professional. Best experience ever. The room was clean daily everything was spotless. Definitely will come again.

sample_comments.title: Thank you for the exceptional welcoming
sample_comments.text:
Sharing with Helen and Minh might be the best moments of my stay. 
All the great advices, their kindness end our jokes with coffee in the morning. 
I love staying in this place!

sample_comments.title: Totally recommend
sample_comments.positives:
The staff and the property were amazing, everything was clean, the lady from the staff gave us an explanation about the tours and what we could do on Hoi an, really helpful! 
We enjoyed the room, was spacious and we had bathtub. The breakfast was really nice, they give you a list where you can choose 2 different alternatives plus fruit and something to drink. 
Thanks for everything

sample_comments.title: There is nothing to criticize.
sample_comments.text: First of all, it was clean. There wasn't a single bug or speck of dust, and the water was pre-filled in glass bottles and kept in the fridge, which was great for having easy access to drinks. I originally upgraded from my previous room, and it had good light and a natural view that was relaxing. The bathtub was also well-maintained with no stains, making it perfect for enjoying a half-body soak. And the staff... they were really friendly. It's hard to believe... it wasn't just one person being kind. Everyone greeted me with a smile when our eyes met and checked if there was anything uncomfortable. I definitely want to stay at this hotel again when I visit Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: This hotel was the best we had in Vietnam. And we passed by 7 hotels during this trip.
sample_comments.positives:
Room: comfy mattress, great decoration, big room. Clean bath. 

Staff: Helen, from the front desk, was a brilliant concierge. Took care of our laundry, set our tours easily, always giving precise directions during our days in Hoi An. She asked a Taxi from and to Danang airport, and was the same price as Grab and big/new car. She did a free Vietnamese coffee workshop for us on our arrival. 

Location was best combination ever: very close to old town, but in a silence street. 

Breakfast: tasty

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Stay
sample_comments.text: I have no hesitation in giving this place a positive review! Hoianese manages group of hotels/hostel who really know how to provide a great experience for their guests. I already made a detailed post on Google already so I don't want to be repetitive. Room is exactly as pictured and was provided an upgrade without even asking. Staff are very attentive and friendly, making it a truly memorable stay. I booked three nights and extended for one more night because of how great everything was!

sample_comments.title: Lovely people in a lovely place
sample_comments.positives:
- new facilities 
- staff were amazing (Sunny and Gavy were the staff members I was around and they were such a pleasure. Sweet, down to earth people that I hope to meet again someday. Stay well you two)
- location is great
- they walk you through pretty much everything to do in Hoi An when you arrive, they give you a brochure too of stuff they recommend

sample_comments.title: Short stay in old town Hoi An
sample_comments.text: This a wonderful small hotel with the most fantastic staff! Min especially was so welcoming and helpful, and all the staff, even cleaning and cooking staff were so friendly and smiley! The beds are also very comfortable and the room was nice and spacious. A highlight of this hotel was the free walking tour and history talk, Bao was an excellent story teller. We will be recommending this hotel to our friends, and we'll be back!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
It was a very large and clean room, perfect for a stay.
We were so well taken care of by all the staff and they were so kind and helpful.
The professional service provided by Sunny and Helen is greatly appreciated!!

sample_comments.title: Fabulous Stay at Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel
sample_comments.text: Our stay at this hotel was perfect and downright luxurious-feeling! All the staff were very friendly, welcoming, and detail-oriented. Min, in particular, took great care with orienting us and ensuring our stay was comfortable. Clean, lovely facilities and nice touches. Would definitely return.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: I stayed at the opening of the hotel so I got a discount , the staff Sunny was enthusiastic and when I check out I also get an opening gift. all things so nice

sample_comments.title: Lovely Stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Had a great stay here! Helen, Moon, and Min were all super friendly and gave us a really good intro to Hoi An. The hotel offers lots of activities you can book, which is nice, though we just happened to have ours planned already. Breakfast was delicious and the portions were huge. Also, the location is perfect, just a short walk to the Old Town. Definitely recommend!

sample_comments.title: Recomendadisímo
sample_comments.positives: Todo esta genial, las chicas son encantadoras y te ayudan con todo. El desayuno esta buenisimo, y la habitación muy bien.
sample_comments.negatives:
Se escucha todo, por lo que es un poco molesto, es el único motivo por el que no le pongo un 10. 
El olor del ambientador para mi gusto, demasiado fuerte.

sample_comments.title: If you are confused where to stay, just go here
sample_comments.text:
Thank you Min for the best service in Hoi An!

My wife and I stayed here for a night in Hoi An and the room was comfy, clean, and not just Min but all the staff here are super friendly!

If you have no idea what to do in Hoi An, the reception team will give you so much info on reputable spots for dining, tailoring, and tours.

For the price you pay per night, this place is a miracle. Apparently they opened up 7 months ago, and I can see this place getting popular soon. You can't go wrong here!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: La amabilidad de recepción
sample_comments.negatives:
Que no había minibar, ni televisión ni caja fuerte en la habitación. 
Por otra parte, no había ducha, había una gran bañera difícil de entrar y salir por su altura.

sample_comments.title: perfect to explore Hoi An
sample_comments.text:
The staff was extremely helpful, allowed early check-in and also offered many tours and services which are not overpriced, but actually very well organized! The lantern making workshop is a must.
Rooms are clean and nice, too

sample_comments.title: Hoi An y la atención en Hoianese
sample_comments.positives:
Hotel muy bonito. Habitaciones bastante cómodas, limpias y confortables. La atención de Helen y Sunny fue genial y nos ayudaron a aprovechar nuestro tiempo para conocer Hoi An y sus alrededores.

Sin duda, regresaríamos.

sample_comments.title: Best of Hoi An
sample_comments.text: The hotel was beyond expectation than the google and other booking websites pictures, especially all Receptionist ladies were really friendly , polite and helpful. Despite of limited Breakfast menu, it was delicious with enough portion including Drip Coffee, which was amazing. We felt cozy and homely vibe during our stay. Surprisingly, we were upgraded to Superior Room without any charge and even received cute souvenir during check out. Higly recommended, you can book this hotel without second thought.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: El cuarto era muy limpio, me encantó el lugar. El personal me trato muy bien, ya que estaba en un cuadro de estrés muy grande, me ayudaron con lo que necesitaba, estoy muy agradecida. El desayuno estaba de maravilla. El lugar está muy cerca del centro.

sample_comments.title: Really worth it
sample_comments.text: We really liked this hotel. All the staff were very helpful, the environment was comfortable, and the breakfast was delicious.

sample_comments.title: Hotel 10/10. Todo perfecto.
sample_comments.positives: la atención de Gaby, Min, Helen y Emma fue impresionante. Nos trataron muy bien, nos dieron recomendaciones y estaban siempre pendientes de todo lo que necesitamos. El hotel es muy lindo, limpio y elegante. El desayuno es grande y completo: buena cantidad de huevos, pan, un plato local, fruta variada y café.

sample_comments.title: Love Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Best boutique hotel ive been too so far. Good job to Helen and team.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Nos alojamos 3 noches y la verdad que la estancia fue muy agradable. El personal es muy amable y atento. Helen, Emma, Ivy y Min son encantadoras. Te ofrecen ayuda con todo lo que necesites, te dan recomendaciones a cerca de qué visitar o dónde comer, por ejemplo. Las instalaciones son tal cual aparecen en las fotos, que es algo que normalmente no ocurre. Sin duda repetiría si volviese a Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: One of the best accom in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: The hotel far exceeds my expectations for a budget boutique hotel. The staff are super friendly and very helpful building my itinerary. kudos to Helen and team. Will surely be back, because of you guys.

sample_comments.title: El personal fue encantandor!
sample_comments.positives:
Todo ha sido perfecto, desde el desayuno hasta la habitación. En especial mencionar la gran amabilidad y hospitalidad de todo el personal, en especial la de Min, Kimmi e Ivy.
Repetiríamos sin dudarlo.

sample_comments.title: Thank you, Helen!
sample_comments.text:
helen.hahnah Thank you!

I really liked the hotel, which is close to the Old Town but quiet and has a nice atmosphere.

When I opened the window and let the breeze in, it felt really nice, and I thought I wanted to stay here forever.

Also, my husband left something in the closet, but thanks to you remembering the next hotel in Da Nang and promptly contacting the hotel staff, we were able to receive it by motorbike delivery.

I am really grateful.

Hoi An has become my favorite city. I want to stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Volvería a alojarme aquí .
sample_comments.positives: La habitación era amplia y cómoda y con bonita decoración. Las chicas de recepción se preocupan de que estés bien y de que tengas planes para hacer .

sample_comments.title: Great stay, worth the money
sample_comments.text: Good facilities, exceptional price and staff was so helpful and friendly

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Superó nuestras expectativas. La habitación perfecte con la cama muy cómoda. Desayuno increíble y recepción super agradables y muy atentas. Calidad-precio espectacular.

sample_comments.title: A gem in the midst of Hoi An
sample_comments.text: We had a wonderful experience staying at Hoianese hotel. Tuyen, Lan & Min are so friendly, welcoming & helpful. The hotel is clean, nice & quiet. We love our room. The location is walking distance to the old quarter. We love our time here & will definitely stay here again if we come back

sample_comments.title: Muy recomendable
sample_comments.positives: El trato recibido. Llegamos muy temprano el día del checking y nos dejaron entrar en la habitación sin ningún cargo.

sample_comments.title: I enjoyed my stay here
sample_comments.text: As a 3 star hotel, Hoianese Old Town Boutique is exceptional. It's located in the Old Town area but in a quiet block, 10 mins walking distance from the old Town which made wandering in the old Town in evening very convenient. I could even hear gentle chirping of insects. I loved it and felt peaceful. How their room actually looks like is as same as in the picture, no cheating or fake pictures. The best part is the reception team. I had interaction the most with Helen, who is a warm and caring girl. She gave me a map when I checked in and introduced some tours, restaurants and activities I could do. Besides, Minh and were friendly with smiles on their faces too. I am happy to choose it again if I ever come back.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: El trato y la disponibilidad para lo que necesites es inigualable. La calidad humana del equipo que trabaja allí es admirable, nos hicieron sentir como en casa. Sin duda repetiría.

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel
sample_comments.text:
This is my 9th year traveling in Asia and honestly, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel was one of the best all-around stays I've had. I booked the room with the field view.

Things I really liked:

It was super quiet - both the hotel's location (a calm street with barely any traffic) and the room itself. Slept great every night.

The bed was very comfortable - good mattress, soft cotton sheets. Outlets and nightstands on both sides, which is always appreciated.

The room had everything we needed: a fridge to keep our water cold, a chair for clothes, a wardrobe. Just practical and well thought-out. Only small downside was not really having a good spot to place our two big travel bags.

Bathroom was also practical - strong hangers that held our toiletry bags, nice mirror, warm water with good flow. Would've preferred a standing shower over a bathtub, but sitting and showering worked fine.

WiFi was mostly stable and fast.

The location is great - quiet but close to laundry places and local restaurants that aren't full of tourists. The ancient town is walking distance, which made it easy to visit without feeling stuck in the crowds all the time.

Staff were super friendly and cleaned the room daily. We only had breakfast once (egg and toast, the usual), but there are plenty of places around for food anyway.

Overall, super relaxing and smooth stay. Would definitely stay again.

sample_comments.title: El mejor hotel en el que hemos estado en Vietnam!
sample_comments.positives: La estancia fue maravillosa. Desde el momento de la recepción Helen nos atendió y nos aconsejó muy bien. Contratamos con ellos varias actividades y los precios eran justos, todo bien organizado. La habitación nos encantó, definitivamente el mejor hotel en el que estuvimos en Vietnam, limpio, cómodo, bonito.
sample_comments.negatives: Por poner algún contra, el momento del desayuno se alargaba demasiado si tenías prisa para empezar una excursión. Igual deberían de tener el café ya preparado.

sample_comments.title: Amazing time at this hotel and Hoi an
sample_comments.text: Had an amazing time in the hotel and sunny was the best ! She gave us so much recommendations and we even booked an extra night cause of how much we loved the hotel, staff and hoi an

sample_comments.title: Espectacular
sample_comments.positives: El hotel es muy muy bonito! Súper cómodo, y el personal es demasiado atento. Buen tamaño de la habitación y del baño. Muy bien ubicado, cerca de las calles principales, pero lo suficientemente lejos para respirar paz. Sin duda volvería a este hotel.

sample_comments.title: Such a wonderful stay amazing staff and service
sample_comments.text: We loved our time at this hotel we even booked an extra night! Sunny was so informative and kind when we arrived and went above and beyond for us! We decided to book an extra nice based on her service in hotel and her recommendations in hoi an

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Maravillosa experiencia! Buena ubicación, bonita y confortable habitación, delicioso desayuno.
El personal es muy amable y está siempre atento a todo lo que puedas necesitar.
Altamente recomendable

sample_comments.title: Great Hospitality!!! Friendly staffs :)
sample_comments.text:
Sunny, Ming, and Julie are very helpful during our stay in Hoi An. 
Clean bedroom, clean bathroom, great location (we can go to a lot of places just by walking), amazing services! We rented bicycles here and it was fun! Will go back to this place if we visit Hoi An again :)

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: La habitación era hermosa. La atención del personal espectacular. Las instalaciones muy bien. El free tour que hicimos estuvo buenísimo. El desayuno espectacular.
sample_comments.negatives: Solo como detalle, tienen un café de cortesía muy rico que se prepara con unos utensilios muy típicos de allí que me gustaron mucho, pero tardaba mucho tiempo en prepararse. Podrían tener esa opción y algún café de sobre para hacerlo más rápido.

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text:
We had such a wonderful time in this hotel. 
The staff is caring and attentionate. Breakfast is delicious and generous. The rooms are clean and very well maintained.
We would love to come back here anytime.

sample_comments.title: Excepcional, personal muy amable
sample_comments.positives: Mucho

sample_comments.title: Such a charming hidden gem!
sample_comments.text:
Pros: Super clean, charming, comfortable ... we felt right at home. The staff, Helen, Gavy, and Sunny were super kind, helpful and professional. Mosquito spray was nice to have although we didn't need it. Strongly recommend 

Cons: We wished to have shower for easy access, not a bathtub to climb into. Also a small frigerator in the room would come handy.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: La atención fue excepcional. Las recepcionistas fueron en exceso buen onda y siempre dispuestas a ayudar y resolver. Helen, Judy y Min fueron increíblemente colaboradoras y amables.
sample_comments.negatives: La habitación tenía un leve olor a humedad, pero asumo que es por el clima de la ciudad. Nada grave.

sample_comments.title: Comfort and convenience!
sample_comments.text: The staff was professional, super kind and helpful. Their English was perfect. We felt right at home. The location was quiet and yet ideal to experience the old town and major attractions that Hoi An has to offer. We would definitely love to stay here again and strongly recommend this charming hotel.

sample_comments.title: Perfecto !
sample_comments.positives:
En relación calidad precio, ha sido el mejor hotel de mis dos semanas por Vietnam. La habitación es preciosa, el baño grande con una bañera divina. Además nuestra habitación tenía ventana y un pequeño balcón y entraba una luz bonita. Cama muy cómoda y se ve en general todo bastante nuevo. Las fotos de booking coinciden con la habitación. 
Las chicas de recepción Min, Juddy y Helen son encantadoras. Hablan inglés y te ayudan con todo. Tuvimos un problema con el agua caliente y en menos de media hora ya habían llamado al encargado de mantenimiento y lo habían solucionado.
También te hacen recomendaciones sobre qué visitar en Hoi An y dónde comer.
Una pena tener que irnos de Hoi An, nos pillaron días de lluvia y no lo hemos disfrutado como se debe, pero si volvemos seguro nos quedamos aquí de nuevo.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: This was the best hotel I stayed at during my 5 week journey to Southeast Asia. A special thanks to both Min and Helen, they were so helpful and were the best. A great hotel stay

sample_comments.title: Espectacular
sample_comments.positives: Me encantó todo. Me sentí muy cómoda en la habitación, la cama buenísima, desayuno abundante y la amabilidad del personal fue lo máximo. Me sentí como en casa. Me quedé en 3 hoteles en Hoi An y este fue lejos el mejor.

sample_comments.title: Worth the money
sample_comments.text: Cleanliness is top notch....they have spacious bathtub and the room itself is spacious for a cheap rate. They even have unlimited coffee and water pantry to indulge in. Location is also very accessible to the old town by walk. Definitely worth the money

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Todo, muy buena ubicación, la habitación que habíamos reservado no nos convence pq está en la planta de recepción y nos la cambian sin problema por una mejor. Helen ha sido un cielo, nos ha informado de todo y ha hecho la visita super fácil. Desayuno muy completo y a la carta. Para repetir sin duda!

sample_comments.title: Excellent visit
sample_comments.text: Highly recommended. Welcoming and helpful staff, very high quality of room, delicious and large breakfast. Received a free upgrade in room and had lots of advice on organising my stay.

sample_comments.title: El hotel perfecto.
sample_comments.positives: Todo el hotel está muy limpio, personal inigualable, tres chicas Gavi, Hellen y no recuerdo el nombre de la otra. Te ayudan en todo momento. Nada mas llegar te explican todos los sitios turísticos donde puedes ir, donde comer los mejores platos típicos incluso donde comprar. Hemos salido encantados.

sample_comments.title: Parfait je recommande
sample_comments.text:
J'ai passé un excellent séjour
Tout était parfait pour moi, je ne suis pas quelqu'un de compliqué.
Eau chaude, bonne literie, et staff très gentil et accueillant!
Je recommande 

Merci à Helen et toute l'équipe

sample_comments.title: Opción perfecta en Hoi An
sample_comments.positives: La amabilidad de las chicas de recepción es magnífica, se aprenden tu nombre y te explican todas las opciones disponibles para hacer en Hoi An y recomendaciones de sitios para comer. La ubicación perfecta a 5 minutos andando calle abajo del centro histórico. Todo limpio y muy cuidado, la relación calidad- precio es perfecta. La cama grande y cómoda, con nórdico y varias almohadas. El baño espacioso, con todas las amenities, el agua sale caliente y con muy buena presión. Tiene secador de pelo.
sample_comments.negatives: El aire acondicionado un poco ruidoso y la bañera un poco incómoda si se aloja gente mayor, para mí ideal

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Merveilleux hôtel, calme et très bien situé juste à quelques minutes du centre. L'equipe Helen, Kimi, Emma et spring sont aux petits soins pour vous. Toujours le sourire et le petit mot qui vous fait sentir bien comme à la maison.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
El personal es fantástico, desde el inicio te cuidan y son muy atentos para cualquier situación. 
La habitación es estupenda
En el entorno tienes muchos servicios completarlos, es una zona muy tranquila y está cerca de la zona vieja.
Gracias Suny, Sasa y Helen.

sample_comments.title: Très bien...mais
sample_comments.text:
L'hôtel est vraiment bien placé a 800m du centre a pieds. 
Ivy, Hélène et Minh sont vraiment charmantes et aux petits soins. Le petit déjeuner est très bon, pas de buffet mais ce qui est proposé comme choix suffit amplement .
Les seuls points négatifs et là je ne parle que de ma chambre 303, sont que les rideaux doivent toujours être tirés car les fenêtres donnant sur la chambre donnent sur le couloir et le bruit qui monte de la salle du petit déjeuner et qui commencent dès 6h45!!
Donc je recommande mais avec des bouchons d'oreilles.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Nos gustó todo , el hotel está muy bien ubicado , con unas instalaciones muy buenas , la cama comodísima , se agradece mucho, el baño las toallas , el desayuno, el personal maravilloso nos atendió estupendamente, nos recomendaron lugares donde comer , sitios que visitar y fue un acierto sus recomendaciones, las valoramos mucho ( Sunny, Gabi , Helen y el personal de cocina , muy buen equipo, se los recomendamos.

sample_comments.title: Hôtel exceptionnel
sample_comments.text:
Hotel très bien placé dans une rue calme mais à quelques minutes à pied du vieux centre. La chambre est spacieuse, bien équipée, propre avec des rangements.

Le personnel est adorable, tout le monde a la réception met vraiment le service client au coeur de leur travail. Ils proposent un service de laundry, des scooters, des tours et des conseils de restaurants ou de choses à faire à Hoi An. Un grand merci à Ivy, Sunny, Min et Kimmi.

Je ne peux que vous recommander cet hôtel

sample_comments.title: Hôtel un peu prétentieux et trop cher pour la prestation qui reste minimale
sample_comments.positives: Grande chambre. Bonne literie. Relativement calme. Quartier sympa et tout a proximité.
sample_comments.negatives:
Baignoire peu pratique. Accès avec une marche haute. Peut être dangereux. Balcon minuscule.
Pas de témédiocre.
Formule petit déjeuner mal équilibrée
Staff sympathique mais tres mercantile.
Rapport qualité prix mediocre.

sample_comments.title: Sejour Hoi An
sample_comments.text:
Tres bel hotel bien situé pour decouvrir le vieux quartier de Hoi An tout en etant au calme pour dormir.
Helen a l'accueil aura etait d'une grande aide pour organiser ces 2 jours sur place.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
Julie (Tham) est adorable.
Très bon petit déjeuner.
sample_comments.negatives: Chambre 404 (au 3ème étage), bruyante. On entend un moteur au-dessus du plafond/toit qui s'arrête et redémarre toute la nuit. L'ascenseur est également bruyant.

sample_comments.title: Perfect
sample_comments.text: The best hotel during our journey in Vietnam. Sunny and all the team are perfect and sweet. Best place in Hoi an. I recommand.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: L'accueil, la disponibilité du personnel, la gentillesse, l'emplacement.

sample_comments.title: Un séjour parfait dans un cadre idéal
sample_comments.text: Hôtel neuf, joliment décoré et parfaitement propre. La chambre est tout aussi agréable : propre, bien aménagée, avec un lit très confortable, et tout le nécessaire à disposition (rasoir, coton-tige, etc.). Le nettoyage est fait quotidiennement, ce qui est un vrai plus. Helen m'a réservé un accueil exceptionnel : toujours souriante, à l'écoute et d'une grande patience. Sunny a également été d'une grande gentillesse. L'emplacement est idéal, à seulement 5 minutes de la vieille ville, avec de nombreux restaurants à proximité. Un séjour parfait !

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Nous avons apprécié l accueil du personnel sa disponibilité et sa gentillesse de spring helen et leur collègue. Très très charmantes personnes.

secondary.description_full:
Khám Phá Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel - Trải Nghiệm Đẳng Cấp Tại Hội An

Nằm ngay trung tâm của phố cổ Hội An xinh đẹp, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đích thực với phong cách thiết kế tinh tế và dịch vụ chu đáo. Khách sạn có tổng cộng 20 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, phù hợp cho các cặp đôi, gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp cổ kính của phố cổ. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 14:00 và trả phòng đến 11:00 sáng hôm sau, giúp quý khách dễ dàng lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi của mình.

Điểm đặc biệt của khách sạn là chính sách thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 10 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ. Với vị trí đắc địa và dịch vụ tận tâm, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel chính là điểm đến lý tưởng để trải nghiệm nét đẹp truyền thống pha lẫn hiện đại của Hội An.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, khách lưu trú sẽ được trải nghiệm những tiện ích hiện đại và tiện nghi nhằm mang lại sự thoải mái tối đa trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là tiện lợi, giúp bạn giữ gìn quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và tươi mới sau những ngày khám phá thành phố cổ Hội An. Đặc biệt, các hộp an toàn cá nhân được trang bị đầy đủ trong phòng giúp khách yên tâm về tài sản quý giá của mình trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Ngoài ra, khách còn được tận hưởng kết nối Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn dễ dàng liên lạc và chia sẻ những khoảnh khắc đẹp của chuyến đi. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, mang lại cảm giác thư thái và dễ chịu. Tất cả những tiện ích này đều hướng tới việc tạo ra một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái, an toàn và thuận tiện cho khách lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, du khách sẽ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái với các tiện nghi hiện đại. Phòng nghỉ được trang bị điều hòa không khí giúp duy trì nhiệt độ lý tưởng, mang lại cảm giác dễ chịu bất kể thời tiết bên ngoài. Đặc biệt, mỗi phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn, ngắm nhìn cảnh quan xung quanh và tận hưởng không khí trong lành của phố cổ Hội An.
Ngoài ra, khách lưu trú còn được cung cấp đầy đủ các dụng cụ vệ sinh cá nhân như đồ dùng vệ sinh, dầu gội, sữa tắm, giúp bạn cảm thấy tiện lợi và sạch sẽ trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Máy sấy tóc cũng được trang bị sẵn sàng để phục vụ nhu cầu của khách, đảm bảo bạn luôn chuẩn bị sẵn sàng để ra ngoài khám phá thành phố xinh đẹp này một cách tự tin và thoải mái.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo từ mọi chi tiết nhỏ nhất. Không chỉ mang lại sự sạch sẽ, dịch vụ này còn giúp bạn cảm thấy yên tâm và thoải mái hơn trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Hãy để chúng tôi chăm sóc không gian của bạn, để bạn có thể tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp cổ kính của phố cổ Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về việc dọn dẹp hay bảo trì.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đặc Trưng Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình, từ các phòng Budget Double phù hợp cho những chuyến đi tiết kiệm, đến các phòng Standard Double và Superior Double mang lại sự thoải mái hơn trong không gian nghỉ dưỡng. Đối với những khách muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng và đẳng cấp, các phòng Deluxe King, Deluxe Lake View và Deluxe Balcony Room sẽ mang đến cảm giác thư thái và tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp của Hội An. Ngoài ra, phòng Deluxe Balcony Room còn giúp bạn tận hưởng không khí trong lành và cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp ngay từ ban công riêng của mình.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quá trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Điều này giúp bạn yên tâm hơn khi chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi, để tập trung tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc đẹp tại Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về thủ tục hay chi phí phát sinh.

Khám Phá Vẻ Đẹp Truyền Thống của Cẩm Phô - Hội An

Cẩm Phô là trái tim của phố cổ Hội An, nơi lưu giữ những nét đẹp cổ kính và truyền thống đặc trưng của miền Trung Việt Nam. Dạo bước qua những con phố nhỏ rợp bóng cây, du khách sẽ cảm nhận được không khí yên bình và đậm đà lịch sử qua các ngôi nhà cổ kính, cửa sổ mái ngói âm dương và những hàng quán bán đặc sản địa phương. Khu vực này không chỉ là trung tâm của các hoạt động văn hóa, mà còn là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức ẩm thực phong phú, từ cao lầu, bánh mì Phượng đến các món ăn truyền thống khác, mang đậm hương vị đặc trưng của Hội An.

Ngoài ra, Cẩm Phô còn gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Chùa Cầu, Phố cổ Hội An và các làng nghề truyền thống. Buổi tối, khu vực này trở nên lung linh huyền ảo dưới ánh đèn lồng rực rỡ, tạo nên một không gian lãng mạn và đầy cảm xúc cho du khách. Với vẻ đẹp vừa cổ kính vừa hiện đại, Cẩm Phô là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá, trải nghiệm và lưu giữ những ký ức đẹp về Hội An - thành phố cổ kính và quyến rũ của Việt Nam.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đến Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Từ sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel bằng nhiều phương tiện khác nhau. Khoảng cách từ sân bay đến khách sạn khoảng 30 km, mất khoảng 45 phút đi xe. Bạn có thể lựa chọn dịch vụ taxi riêng, dịch vụ đưa đón của khách sạn hoặc thuê xe máy để tự lái. Nếu muốn tiết kiệm hơn, các chuyến xe buýt địa phương cũng sẵn sàng phục vụ, đưa bạn đến trung tâm Hội An, từ đó chỉ cần đi bộ hoặc gọi xe ôm để đến khách sạn nằm tại khu phố cổ Cẩm Phô xinh đẹp.

Vị Trí Đắc Địa Gần Các Di Tích Lịch Sử và Văn Hóa Nổi Tiếng

Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel nằm ngay trung tâm phố cổ Hội An, nơi hội tụ của những di tích lịch sử và kiến trúc cổ kính đặc sắc. Chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ ngắn là Chùa Cầu, biểu tượng nổi tiếng của thành phố, mang đậm nét văn hóa truyền thống của người Hội An. Bên cạnh đó, du khách còn dễ dàng ghé thăm Nhà cổ Quân Thắng và Nhà cổ Phùng Hưng để khám phá kiến trúc cổ độc đáo cùng những câu chuyện lịch sử phong phú của khu phố cổ.
Ngoài ra, các địa danh như Đền Quan Công, Đền Cam Phổ và Hội quán Quảng Đông cũng nằm gần đó, mang đến trải nghiệm văn hóa đa dạng và sâu sắc. Những điểm đến này không chỉ giúp du khách hiểu rõ hơn về lịch sử và tín ngưỡng của người dân địa phương mà còn tạo nên một hành trình khám phá đầy màu sắc và ý nghĩa trong chuyến lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Những Nhà Hàng Gần Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Khu vực xung quanh Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel là một thiên đường ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc trưng của ẩm thực Ấn Độ tại Babas Kitchen hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn sáng, brunch và lunch lành mạnh tại Ellie's Cafe Hoi An. Những tín đồ bánh mì sẽ không thể bỏ qua Banh Mi Sum, trong khi những ai yêu thích ẩm thực Ấn Độ có thể ghé SRI Spices Indian Family Restaurant để trải nghiệm hương vị đậm đà. Các nhà hàng như Cabanon, Seashell by Nu Eatery, Mai Fish Restaurant và Quan Chay Nhat Da mang đến những lựa chọn đa dạng từ hải sản tươi ngon, món chay đến các món đặc trưng của địa phương. Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể tham gia lớp học nấu ăn chay hoặc thưởng thức cà phê tại Relics Coffee and Restaurant, hoặc khám phá các món bánh truyền thống Việt Nam tại CHAY Corner trong Hội An.

Các điểm mua sắm nổi bật xung quanh Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel

Khách lưu trú tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel sẽ dễ dàng tiếp cận nhiều điểm mua sắm độc đáo và hấp dẫn trong khu vực. Bạn có thể thăm Phòng Trưng Bày Nghệ Thuật để thưởng thức các tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo, hoặc ghé qua Nhà may 724 Tailors và Nhà may BYFAS để đặt may trang phục theo phong cách riêng. Các cửa hàng như Cửa hàng Bạch Dương, Tiệm vải Bi Hạnh, Tiệm vải Nu Ni và Nhà may Khôi mang đến sự đa dạng về vải vóc và thời trang. Đối với những ai yêu thích phụ kiện và đồ da, Hiệu da Min Thu là điểm đến lý tưởng. Ngoài ra, Chị Ba Boutique và 79 Tony cũng là những địa chỉ mua sắm thời trang phong cách, giúp du khách dễ dàng tìm thấy những món đồ phù hợp để lưu giữ kỷ niệm về chuyến đi của mình.

Giá phòng tại Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel - Cạnh tranh và hợp lý

Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel mang đến mức giá phòng trung bình từ 26 đến 50 USD, phù hợp với ngân sách của nhiều du khách khi khám phá phố cổ Hội An. Với mức giá này, du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian ấm cúng, tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chất lượng mà không cần lo lắng về chi phí. Đặc biệt, mức giá này khá cạnh tranh so với mức trung bình của toàn thành phố Hội An, cũng dao động từ 26 đến 50 USD, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng lựa chọn và trải nghiệm mà không phải hy sinh về chất lượng dịch vụ.

So với các khách sạn khác trong khu vực, Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel nổi bật với giá cả hợp lý, phù hợp với nhiều nhóm du khách từ du lịch gia đình, cặp đôi đến nhóm bạn. Điều này làm cho khách sạn trở thành một điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp của phố cổ Hội An mà vẫn tiết kiệm chi phí. Với mức giá cạnh tranh cùng dịch vụ tốt, đây chính là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho những ai muốn tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp của Hội An mà không phải lo lắng về giá cả.

Đánh Giá Tích Cực Về Khách Sạn Hoianese Old Town Boutique

Điểm đặc biệt khiến khách hàng yêu thích nơi đây chính là vị trí thuận tiện, nằm ngay trung tâm, giúp dễ dàng khám phá và trải nghiệm các điểm đến nổi bật của Hội An. Đồng thời, đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp và luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ đã góp phần nâng cao trải nghiệm của khách lưu trú, đạt điểm số 9.9 cho hiệu suất làm việc của nhân viên. Tất cả những yếu tố này đã tạo nên một không gian nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng, nơi khách hàng không chỉ cảm thấy hài lòng mà còn muốn quay trở lại trong những lần tới.

embedding_text:
Khách sạn Hoianese Quiet Old Town (Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel) tại Hội An.
Địa chỉ: 30 Bà Triệu, Phường Cẩm Phổ, Cẩm Phô, Hội An, Việt Nam.
Hãy để chuyến đi của quý khách có một khởi đầu tuyệt vời khi ở lại khách sạn này, nơi có Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng. Nằm ở vị trí chiến lược tại Cẩm Phô, cho phép quý khách lui tới và gần với các điểm thu hút và tham quan địa phương. Đừng rời đi trước khi ghé thăm Phố cổ Hội An nổi tiếng.
Tiện ích: Bàn làm việc, Bình chữa cháy, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bơi với ống thở, Bồn tắm, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Chuyến du lịch, Cách phương tiện công cộng 570 mét, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ bán thức ăn sáng mang về, Dịch vụ giặt là, Dịch vụ khử trùng chuyên nghiệp, Dịch vụ thanh toán không sử dụng tiền mặt, Dịch vụ vé, Dịch vụ đưa đón, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giao đồ ăn, Giá treo quần áo, Giãn cách vật lý ít nhất 1 mét, Giải trí trong khuôn viên, Giặt đồ vải lanh và quần áo bằng nước nóng, Giữ hành lý, Internet, Không có văn phòng phẩm dùng chung, Két sắt, Lặn, Lựa chọn thức ăn bọc riêng.
Điểm đánh giá 9.7/10 dựa trên 1114 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Địa điểm, Độ sạch sẽ, Bữa sáng, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Đáng tiền, Không khí, Kích thước phòng.
Các loại phòng: Deluxe giường King (Deluxe King); Phòng Superior (Superior); Phòng Loại Sang Hướng Phố (Deluxe Street View); Phòng Đôi (Double); Phòng Loại Sang (Deluxe); Phòng Deluxe hướng Hồ (Deluxe Lake View).
Gần: Nhà may Như Mai, Nhà may ToTo, Tiệm vải Rubin, Tiệm vải Lucky Number, Đông Dương, Nhà cổ.
